8032            self.ids
8033                .lowest_available_dcid_seq()
8034                .ok_or(Error::OutOfIdentifiers)?
8035        };
8036
8037        let mut path = path::Path::new(
8038            local_addr,
8039            peer_addr,
8040            &self.recovery_config,
8041            self.path_challenge_recv_max_queue_len,
8042            MIN_CLIENT_INITIAL_LEN,
8043            false,
8044        );
8045        path.active_dcid_seq = Some(dcid_seq);
8046
8047        let pid = self
8048            .paths
8049            .insert_path(path, false)
8050            .map_err(|_| Error::OutOfIdentifiers)?;
8051        self.ids.link_dcid_to_path_id(dcid_seq, pid)?;
8052
8053        Ok(pid)
8054    }
8055
8056    // Marks the connection as closed and does any related tidyup.
8057    fn mark_closed(&mut self) {
8058        #[cfg(feature = "qlog")]
8059        {
8060            let cc = match (self.is_established(), self.timed_out, &self.peer_error, &self.local_error) {
8061                (false, _, _, _) => qlog::events::connectivity::ConnectionClosed {
8062                    owner: Some(TransportOwner::Local),
8063                    connection_code: None,
8064                    application_code: None,
8065                    internal_code: None,
8066                    reason: Some("Failed to establish connection".to_string()),
8067                    trigger: Some(qlog::events::connectivity::ConnectionClosedTrigger::HandshakeTimeout)
8068                },
8069
8070                (true, true, _, _) => qlog::events::connectivity::ConnectionClosed {
8071                    owner: Some(TransportOwner::Local),
8072                    connection_code: None,
8073                    application_code: None,
8074                    internal_code: None,
8075                    reason: Some("Idle timeout".to_string()),
8076                    trigger: Some(qlog::events::connectivity::ConnectionClosedTrigger::IdleTimeout)
8077                },
8078
8079                (true, false, Some(peer_error), None) => {
8080                    let (connection_code, application_code, trigger) = if peer_error.is_app {
8081                        (None, Some(qlog::events::ApplicationErrorCode::Value(peer_error.error_code)), None)
8082                    } else {
8083                        let trigger = if peer_error.error_code == WireErrorCode::NoError as u64 {
8084                            Some(qlog::events::connectivity::ConnectionClosedTrigger::Clean)
8085                        } else {
8086                            Some(qlog::events::connectivity::ConnectionClosedTrigger::Error)
8087                        };
8088
8089                        (Some(qlog::events::ConnectionErrorCode::Value(peer_error.error_code)), None, trigger)
8090                    };
8091
8092                    qlog::events::connectivity::ConnectionClosed {
8093                        owner: Some(TransportOwner::Remote),
8094                        connection_code,
8095                        application_code,
8096                        internal_code: None,
8097                        reason: Some(String::from_utf8_lossy(&peer_error.reason).to_string()),
8098                        trigger,
8099                    }
8100                },
8101
8102                (true, false, None, Some(local_error)) => {
8103                    let (connection_code, application_code, trigger) = if local_error.is_app {
8104                        (None, Some(qlog::events::ApplicationErrorCode::Value(local_error.error_code)), None)
8105                    } else {
8106                        let trigger = if local_error.error_code == WireErrorCode::NoError as u64 {
8107                            Some(qlog::events::connectivity::ConnectionClosedTrigger::Clean)
8108                        } else {
8109                            Some(qlog::events::connectivity::ConnectionClosedTrigger::Error)
8110                        };
8111
8112                        (Some(qlog::events::ConnectionErrorCode::Value(local_error.error_code)), None, trigger)
8113                    };
8114
8115                    qlog::events::connectivity::ConnectionClosed {
8116                        owner: Some(TransportOwner::Local),
8117                        connection_code,
8118                        application_code,
8119                        internal_code: None,
8120                        reason: Some(String::from_utf8_lossy(&local_error.reason).to_string()),
8121                        trigger,
8122                    }
8123                },
8124
8125                _ => qlog::events::connectivity::ConnectionClosed {
8126                    owner: None,
8127                    connection_code: None,
8128                    application_code: None,
8129                    internal_code: None,
8130                    reason: None,
8131                    trigger: None,
8132                },
8133            };
8134
8135            qlog_with_type!(QLOG_CONNECTION_CLOSED, self.qlog, q, {
8136                let ev_data = qlog::events::EventData::ConnectionClosed(cc);
8137
8138                q.add_event_data_now(ev_data).ok();
8139            });
8140            self.qlog.streamer = None;
8141        }
8142        self.closed = true;
8143    }
8144}
8145
8146#[cfg(feature = "boringssl-boring-crate")]
8147impl AsMut<boring::ssl::SslRef> for Connection {
8148    fn as_mut(&mut self) -> &mut boring::ssl::SslRef {
8149        self.handshake.ssl_mut()
8150    }
8151}
8152
8153/// Maps an `Error` to `Error::Done`, or itself.
8154///
8155/// When a received packet that hasn't yet been authenticated triggers a failure
8156/// it should, in most cases, be ignored, instead of raising a connection error,
8157/// to avoid potential man-in-the-middle and man-on-the-side attacks.
8158///
8159/// However, if no other packet was previously received, the connection should
8160/// indeed be closed as the received packet might just be network background
8161/// noise, and it shouldn't keep resources occupied indefinitely.
8162///
8163/// This function maps an error to `Error::Done` to ignore a packet failure
8164/// without aborting the connection, except when no other packet was previously
8165/// received, in which case the error itself is returned, but only on the
8166/// server-side as the client will already have armed the idle timer.
8167///
8168/// This must only be used for errors preceding packet authentication. Failures
8169/// happening after a packet has been authenticated should still cause the
8170/// connection to be aborted.
8171fn drop_pkt_on_err(
8172    e: Error, recv_count: usize, is_server: bool, trace_id: &str,
8173) -> Error {
8174    // On the server, if no other packet has been successfully processed, abort
8175    // the connection to avoid keeping the connection open when only junk is
8176    // received.
8177    if is_server && recv_count == 0 {
8178        return e;
8179    }
8180
8181    trace!("{} dropped invalid packet", trace_id);
8182
8183    // Ignore other invalid packets that haven't been authenticated to prevent
8184    // man-in-the-middle and man-on-the-side attacks.
8185    Error::Done
8186}
8187
8188struct AddrTupleFmt(SocketAddr, SocketAddr);
8189
8190impl std::fmt::Display for AddrTupleFmt {
8191    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter) -> std::fmt::Result {
8192        let AddrTupleFmt(src, dst) = &self;
8193
8194        if src.ip().is_unspecified() || dst.ip().is_unspecified() {
8195            return Ok(());
8196        }
8197
8198        f.write_fmt(format_args!("src:{src} dst:{dst}"))
8199    }
8200}
8201
8202/// Statistics about the connection.
8203///
8204/// A connection's statistics can be collected using the [`stats()`] method.
8205///
8206/// [`stats()`]: struct.Connection.html#method.stats
8207#[derive(Clone, Default)]
8208pub struct Stats {
8209    /// The number of QUIC packets received.
8210    pub recv: usize,
8211
8212    /// The number of QUIC packets sent.
8213    pub sent: usize,
8214
8215    /// The number of QUIC packets that were lost.
8216    pub lost: usize,
8217
8218    /// The number of sent QUIC packets with retransmitted data.
8219    pub retrans: usize,
8220
8221    /// The number of sent bytes.
8222    pub sent_bytes: u64,
8223
8224    /// The number of received bytes.
8225    pub recv_bytes: u64,
8226
8227    /// The number of bytes sent acked.
8228    pub acked_bytes: u64,
8229
8230    /// The number of bytes sent lost.
8231    pub lost_bytes: u64,
8232
8233    /// The number of stream bytes retransmitted.
8234    pub stream_retrans_bytes: u64,
8235
8236    /// The number of DATAGRAM frames received.
8237    pub dgram_recv: usize,
8238
8239    /// The number of DATAGRAM frames sent.
8240    pub dgram_sent: usize,
8241
8242    /// The number of known paths for the connection.
8243    pub paths_count: usize,
8244
8245    /// The number of streams reset by local.
8246    pub reset_stream_count_local: u64,
8247
8248    /// The number of streams stopped by local.
8249    pub stopped_stream_count_local: u64,
8250
8251    /// The number of streams reset by remote.
8252    pub reset_stream_count_remote: u64,
8253
8254    /// The number of streams stopped by remote.
8255    pub stopped_stream_count_remote: u64,
8256
8257    /// The total number of PATH_CHALLENGE frames that were received.
8258    pub path_challenge_rx_count: u64,
8259}
8260
8261impl std::fmt::Debug for Stats {
8262    #[inline]
8263    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter) -> std::fmt::Result {
8264        write!(
8265            f,
8266            "recv={} sent={} lost={} retrans={}",
8267            self.recv, self.sent, self.lost, self.retrans,
8268        )?;
8269
8270        write!(
8271            f,
8272            " sent_bytes={} recv_bytes={} lost_bytes={}",
8273            self.sent_bytes, self.recv_bytes, self.lost_bytes,
8274        )?;
8275
8276        Ok(())
8277    }
8278}
8279
8280/// QUIC Unknown Transport Parameter.
8281///
8282/// A QUIC transport parameter that is not specifically recognized
8283/// by this implementation.
8284#[derive(Clone, Debug, PartialEq)]
8285pub struct UnknownTransportParameter<T> {
8286    /// The ID of the unknown transport parameter.
8287    pub id: u64,
8288
8289    /// Original data representing the value of the unknown transport parameter.
8290    pub value: T,
8291}
8292
8293impl<T> UnknownTransportParameter<T> {
8294    /// Checks whether an unknown Transport Parameter's ID is in the reserved
8295    /// space.
8296    ///
8297    /// See Section 18.1 in [RFC9000](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc9000#name-reserved-transport-paramete).
8298    pub fn is_reserved(&self) -> bool {
8299        let n = (self.id - 27) / 31;
8300        self.id == 31 * n + 27
8301    }
8302}
8303
8304#[cfg(feature = "qlog")]
8305impl From<UnknownTransportParameter<Vec<u8>>>
8306    for qlog::events::quic::UnknownTransportParameter
8307{
8308    fn from(value: UnknownTransportParameter<Vec<u8>>) -> Self {
8309        Self {
8310            id: value.id,
8311            value: qlog::HexSlice::maybe_string(Some(value.value.as_slice()))
8312                .unwrap_or_default(),
8313        }
8314    }
8315}
8316
8317impl From<UnknownTransportParameter<&[u8]>>
8318    for UnknownTransportParameter<Vec<u8>>
8319{
8320    // When an instance of an UnknownTransportParameter is actually
8321    // stored in UnknownTransportParameters, then we make a copy
8322    // of the bytes if the source is an instance of an UnknownTransportParameter
8323    // whose value is not owned.
8324    fn from(value: UnknownTransportParameter<&[u8]>) -> Self {
8325        Self {
8326            id: value.id,
8327            value: value.value.to_vec(),
8328        }
8329    }
8330}
8331
8332/// Track unknown transport parameters, up to a limit.
8333#[derive(Clone, Debug, PartialEq, Default)]
8334pub struct UnknownTransportParameters {
8335    /// The space remaining for storing unknown transport parameters.
8336    pub capacity: usize,
8337    /// The unknown transport parameters.
8338    pub parameters: Vec<UnknownTransportParameter<Vec<u8>>>,
8339}
8340
8341impl UnknownTransportParameters {
8342    /// Pushes an unknown transport parameter into storage if there is space
8343    /// remaining.
8344    pub fn push(&mut self, new: UnknownTransportParameter<&[u8]>) -> Result<()> {
8345        let new_unknown_tp_size = new.value.len() + std::mem::size_of::<u64>();
8346        if new_unknown_tp_size < self.capacity {
8347            self.capacity -= new_unknown_tp_size;
8348            self.parameters.push(new.into());
8349            Ok(())
8350        } else {
8351            Err(BufferTooShortError.into())
8352        }
8353    }
8354}
8355
8356/// An Iterator over unknown transport parameters.
8357pub struct UnknownTransportParameterIterator<'a> {
8358    index: usize,
8359    parameters: &'a Vec<UnknownTransportParameter<Vec<u8>>>,
8360}
8361
8362impl<'a> IntoIterator for &'a UnknownTransportParameters {
8363    type IntoIter = UnknownTransportParameterIterator<'a>;
8364    type Item = &'a UnknownTransportParameter<Vec<u8>>;
8365
8366    fn into_iter(self) -> Self::IntoIter {
8367        UnknownTransportParameterIterator {
8368            index: 0,
8369            parameters: &self.parameters,
8370        }
8371    }
8372}
8373
8374impl<'a> Iterator for UnknownTransportParameterIterator<'a> {
8375    type Item = &'a UnknownTransportParameter<Vec<u8>>;
8376
8377    fn next(&mut self) -> Option<Self::Item> {
8378        let result = self.parameters.get(self.index);
8379        self.index += 1;
8380        result
8381    }
8382}
8383
8384/// QUIC Transport Parameters
8385#[derive(Clone, Debug, PartialEq)]
8386pub struct TransportParams {
8387    /// Value of Destination CID field from first Initial packet sent by client
8388    pub original_destination_connection_id: Option<ConnectionId<'static>>,
8389    /// The maximum idle timeout.
8390    pub max_idle_timeout: u64,
8391    /// Token used for verifying stateless resets
8392    pub stateless_reset_token: Option<u128>,
8393    /// The maximum UDP payload size.
8394    pub max_udp_payload_size: u64,
8395    /// The initial flow control maximum data for the connection.
8396    pub initial_max_data: u64,
8397    /// The initial flow control maximum data for local bidirectional streams.
8398    pub initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local: u64,
8399    /// The initial flow control maximum data for remote bidirectional streams.
8400    pub initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote: u64,
8401    /// The initial flow control maximum data for unidirectional streams.
8402    pub initial_max_stream_data_uni: u64,
8403    /// The initial maximum bidirectional streams.
8404    pub initial_max_streams_bidi: u64,
8405    /// The initial maximum unidirectional streams.
8406    pub initial_max_streams_uni: u64,
8407    /// The ACK delay exponent.
8408    pub ack_delay_exponent: u64,
8409    /// The max ACK delay.
8410    pub max_ack_delay: u64,
8411    /// Whether active migration is disabled.
8412    pub disable_active_migration: bool,
8413    /// The active connection ID limit.
8414    pub active_conn_id_limit: u64,
8415    /// The value that the endpoint included in the Source CID field of a Retry
8416    /// Packet.
8417    pub initial_source_connection_id: Option<ConnectionId<'static>>,
8418    /// The value that the server included in the Source CID field of a Retry
8419    /// Packet.
8420    pub retry_source_connection_id: Option<ConnectionId<'static>>,
8421    /// DATAGRAM frame extension parameter, if any.
8422    pub max_datagram_frame_size: Option<u64>,
8423    /// Unknown peer transport parameters and values, if any.
8424    pub unknown_params: Option<UnknownTransportParameters>,
8425    // pub preferred_address: ...,
8426}
8427
8428impl Default for TransportParams {
8429    fn default() -> TransportParams {
8430        TransportParams {
8431            original_destination_connection_id: None,
8432            max_idle_timeout: 0,
8433            stateless_reset_token: None,
8434            max_udp_payload_size: 65527,
8435            initial_max_data: 0,
8436            initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local: 0,
8437            initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote: 0,
8438            initial_max_stream_data_uni: 0,
8439            initial_max_streams_bidi: 0,
8440            initial_max_streams_uni: 0,
8441            ack_delay_exponent: 3,
8442            max_ack_delay: 25,
8443            disable_active_migration: false,
8444            active_conn_id_limit: 2,
8445            initial_source_connection_id: None,
8446            retry_source_connection_id: None,
8447            max_datagram_frame_size: None,
8448            unknown_params: Default::default(),
8449        }
8450    }
8451}
8452
8453impl TransportParams {
8454    fn decode(
8455        buf: &[u8], is_server: bool, unknown_size: Option<usize>,
8456    ) -> Result<TransportParams> {
8457        let mut params = octets::Octets::with_slice(buf);
8458        let mut seen_params = HashSet::new();
8459
8460        let mut tp = TransportParams::default();
8461
8462        if let Some(unknown_transport_param_tracking_size) = unknown_size {
8463            tp.unknown_params = Some(UnknownTransportParameters {
8464                capacity: unknown_transport_param_tracking_size,
8465                parameters: vec![],
8466            });
8467        }
8468
8469        while params.cap() > 0 {
8470            let id = params.get_varint()?;
8471
8472            if seen_params.contains(&id) {
8473                return Err(Error::InvalidTransportParam);
8474            }
8475            seen_params.insert(id);
8476
8477            let mut val = params.get_bytes_with_varint_length()?;
8478
8479            match id {
8480                0x0000 => {
8481                    if is_server {
8482                        return Err(Error::InvalidTransportParam);
8483                    }
8484
8485                    tp.original_destination_connection_id =
8486                        Some(val.to_vec().into());
8487                },
8488
8489                0x0001 => {
8490                    tp.max_idle_timeout = val.get_varint()?;
8491                },
8492
8493                0x0002 => {
8494                    if is_server {
8495                        return Err(Error::InvalidTransportParam);
8496                    }
8497
8498                    tp.stateless_reset_token = Some(u128::from_be_bytes(
8499                        val.get_bytes(16)?
8500                            .to_vec()
8501                            .try_into()
8502                            .map_err(|_| Error::BufferTooShort)?,
8503                    ));
8504                },
8505
8506                0x0003 => {
8507                    tp.max_udp_payload_size = val.get_varint()?;
8508
8509                    if tp.max_udp_payload_size < 1200 {
8510                        return Err(Error::InvalidTransportParam);
8511                    }
8512                },
8513
8514                0x0004 => {
8515                    tp.initial_max_data = val.get_varint()?;
8516                },
8517
8518                0x0005 => {
8519                    tp.initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local = val.get_varint()?;
8520                },
8521
8522                0x0006 => {
8523                    tp.initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote = val.get_varint()?;
8524                },
8525
8526                0x0007 => {
8527                    tp.initial_max_stream_data_uni = val.get_varint()?;
8528                },
8529
8530                0x0008 => {
8531                    let max = val.get_varint()?;
8532
8533                    if max > MAX_STREAM_ID {
8534                        return Err(Error::InvalidTransportParam);
8535                    }
8536
8537                    tp.initial_max_streams_bidi = max;
8538                },
8539
8540                0x0009 => {
8541                    let max = val.get_varint()?;
8542
8543                    if max > MAX_STREAM_ID {
8544                        return Err(Error::InvalidTransportParam);
8545                    }
8546
8547                    tp.initial_max_streams_uni = max;
8548                },
8549
8550                0x000a => {
8551                    let ack_delay_exponent = val.get_varint()?;
8552
8553                    if ack_delay_exponent > 20 {
8554                        return Err(Error::InvalidTransportParam);
8555                    }
8556
8557                    tp.ack_delay_exponent = ack_delay_exponent;
8558                },
8559
8560                0x000b => {
8561                    let max_ack_delay = val.get_varint()?;
8562
8563                    if max_ack_delay >= 2_u64.pow(14) {
8564                        return Err(Error::InvalidTransportParam);
8565                    }
8566
8567                    tp.max_ack_delay = max_ack_delay;
8568                },
8569
8570                0x000c => {
8571                    tp.disable_active_migration = true;
8572                },
8573
8574                0x000d => {
8575                    if is_server {
8576                        return Err(Error::InvalidTransportParam);
8577                    }
8578
8579                    // TODO: decode preferred_address
8580                },
8581
8582                0x000e => {
8583                    let limit = val.get_varint()?;
8584
8585                    if limit < 2 {
8586                        return Err(Error::InvalidTransportParam);
8587                    }
8588
8589                    tp.active_conn_id_limit = limit;
8590                },
8591
8592                0x000f => {
8593                    tp.initial_source_connection_id = Some(val.to_vec().into());
8594                },
8595
8596                0x00010 => {
8597                    if is_server {
8598                        return Err(Error::InvalidTransportParam);
8599                    }
8600
8601                    tp.retry_source_connection_id = Some(val.to_vec().into());
8602                },
8603
8604                0x0020 => {
8605                    tp.max_datagram_frame_size = Some(val.get_varint()?);
8606                },
8607
8608                // Track unknown transport parameters specially.
8609                unknown_tp_id => {
8610                    if let Some(unknown_params) = &mut tp.unknown_params {
8611                        // It is _not_ an error not to have space enough to track
8612                        // an unknown parameter.
8613                        let _ = unknown_params.push(UnknownTransportParameter {
8614                            id: unknown_tp_id,
8615                            value: val.buf(),
8616                        });
8617                    }
8618                },
8619            }
8620        }
8621
8622        Ok(tp)
8623    }
8624
8625    fn encode_param(
8626        b: &mut octets::OctetsMut, ty: u64, len: usize,
8627    ) -> Result<()> {
8628        b.put_varint(ty)?;
8629        b.put_varint(len as u64)?;
8630
8631        Ok(())
8632    }
8633
8634    fn encode<'a>(
8635        tp: &TransportParams, is_server: bool, out: &'a mut [u8],
8636    ) -> Result<&'a mut [u8]> {
8637        let mut b = octets::OctetsMut::with_slice(out);
8638
8639        if is_server {
8640            if let Some(ref odcid) = tp.original_destination_connection_id {
8641                TransportParams::encode_param(&mut b, 0x0000, odcid.len())?;
8642                b.put_bytes(odcid)?;
8643            }
8644        };
8645
8646        if tp.max_idle_timeout != 0 {
8647            TransportParams::encode_param(
8648                &mut b,
8649                0x0001,
8650                octets::varint_len(tp.max_idle_timeout),
8651            )?;
8652            b.put_varint(tp.max_idle_timeout)?;
8653        }
8654
8655        if is_server {
8656            if let Some(ref token) = tp.stateless_reset_token {
8657                TransportParams::encode_param(&mut b, 0x0002, 16)?;
8658                b.put_bytes(&token.to_be_bytes())?;
8659            }
8660        }
8661
8662        if tp.max_udp_payload_size != 0 {
8663            TransportParams::encode_param(
8664                &mut b,
8665                0x0003,
8666                octets::varint_len(tp.max_udp_payload_size),
8667            )?;
8668            b.put_varint(tp.max_udp_payload_size)?;
8669        }
8670
8671        if tp.initial_max_data != 0 {
8672            TransportParams::encode_param(
8673                &mut b,
8674                0x0004,
8675                octets::varint_len(tp.initial_max_data),
8676            )?;
8677            b.put_varint(tp.initial_max_data)?;
8678        }
8679
8680        if tp.initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local != 0 {
8681            TransportParams::encode_param(
8682                &mut b,
8683                0x0005,
8684                octets::varint_len(tp.initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local),
8685            )?;
8686            b.put_varint(tp.initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local)?;
8687        }
8688
8689        if tp.initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote != 0 {
8690            TransportParams::encode_param(
8691                &mut b,
8692                0x0006,
8693                octets::varint_len(tp.initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote),
8694            )?;
8695            b.put_varint(tp.initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote)?;
8696        }
8697
8698        if tp.initial_max_stream_data_uni != 0 {
8699            TransportParams::encode_param(
8700                &mut b,
8701                0x0007,
8702                octets::varint_len(tp.initial_max_stream_data_uni),
8703            )?;
8704            b.put_varint(tp.initial_max_stream_data_uni)?;
8705        }
8706
8707        if tp.initial_max_streams_bidi != 0 {
8708            TransportParams::encode_param(
8709                &mut b,
8710                0x0008,
8711                octets::varint_len(tp.initial_max_streams_bidi),
8712            )?;
8713            b.put_varint(tp.initial_max_streams_bidi)?;
8714        }
8715
8716        if tp.initial_max_streams_uni != 0 {
8717            TransportParams::encode_param(
8718                &mut b,
8719                0x0009,
8720                octets::varint_len(tp.initial_max_streams_uni),
8721            )?;
8722            b.put_varint(tp.initial_max_streams_uni)?;
8723        }
8724
8725        if tp.ack_delay_exponent != 0 {
8726            TransportParams::encode_param(
8727                &mut b,
8728                0x000a,
8729                octets::varint_len(tp.ack_delay_exponent),
8730            )?;
8731            b.put_varint(tp.ack_delay_exponent)?;
8732        }
8733
8734        if tp.max_ack_delay != 0 {
8735            TransportParams::encode_param(
8736                &mut b,
8737                0x000b,
8738                octets::varint_len(tp.max_ack_delay),
8739            )?;
8740            b.put_varint(tp.max_ack_delay)?;
8741        }
8742
8743        if tp.disable_active_migration {
8744            TransportParams::encode_param(&mut b, 0x000c, 0)?;
8745        }
8746
8747        // TODO: encode preferred_address
8748
8749        if tp.active_conn_id_limit != 2 {
8750            TransportParams::encode_param(
8751                &mut b,
8752                0x000e,
8753                octets::varint_len(tp.active_conn_id_limit),
8754            )?;
8755            b.put_varint(tp.active_conn_id_limit)?;
8756        }
8757
8758        if let Some(scid) = &tp.initial_source_connection_id {
8759            TransportParams::encode_param(&mut b, 0x000f, scid.len())?;
8760            b.put_bytes(scid)?;
8761        }
8762
8763        if is_server {
8764            if let Some(scid) = &tp.retry_source_connection_id {
8765                TransportParams::encode_param(&mut b, 0x0010, scid.len())?;
8766                b.put_bytes(scid)?;
8767            }
8768        }
8769
8770        if let Some(max_datagram_frame_size) = tp.max_datagram_frame_size {
8771            TransportParams::encode_param(
8772                &mut b,
8773                0x0020,
8774                octets::varint_len(max_datagram_frame_size),
8775            )?;
8776            b.put_varint(max_datagram_frame_size)?;
8777        }
8778
8779        let out_len = b.off();
8780
8781        Ok(&mut out[..out_len])
8782    }
8783
8784    /// Creates a qlog event for connection transport parameters and TLS fields
8785    #[cfg(feature = "qlog")]
8786    pub fn to_qlog(
8787        &self, owner: TransportOwner, cipher: Option<crypto::Algorithm>,
8788    ) -> EventData {
8789        let original_destination_connection_id = qlog::HexSlice::maybe_string(
8790            self.original_destination_connection_id.as_ref(),
8791        );
8792
8793        let stateless_reset_token = qlog::HexSlice::maybe_string(
8794            self.stateless_reset_token.map(|s| s.to_be_bytes()).as_ref(),
8795        );
8796
8797        let tls_cipher: Option<String> = cipher.map(|f| format!("{f:?}"));
8798
8799        EventData::TransportParametersSet(
8800            qlog::events::quic::TransportParametersSet {
8801                owner: Some(owner),
8802                tls_cipher,
8803                original_destination_connection_id,
8804                stateless_reset_token,
8805                disable_active_migration: Some(self.disable_active_migration),
8806                max_idle_timeout: Some(self.max_idle_timeout),
8807                max_udp_payload_size: Some(self.max_udp_payload_size as u32),
8808                ack_delay_exponent: Some(self.ack_delay_exponent as u16),
8809                max_ack_delay: Some(self.max_ack_delay as u16),
8810                active_connection_id_limit: Some(
8811                    self.active_conn_id_limit as u32,
8812                ),
8813
8814                initial_max_data: Some(self.initial_max_data),
8815                initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local: Some(
8816                    self.initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local,
8817                ),
8818                initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote: Some(
8819                    self.initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote,
8820                ),
8821                initial_max_stream_data_uni: Some(
8822                    self.initial_max_stream_data_uni,
8823                ),
8824                initial_max_streams_bidi: Some(self.initial_max_streams_bidi),
8825                initial_max_streams_uni: Some(self.initial_max_streams_uni),
8826
8827                unknown_parameters: self
8828                    .unknown_params
8829                    .as_ref()
8830                    .map(|unknown_params| {
8831                        unknown_params
8832                            .into_iter()
8833                            .cloned()
8834                            .map(
8835                                Into::<
8836                                    qlog::events::quic::UnknownTransportParameter,
8837                                >::into,
8838                            )
8839                            .collect()
8840                    })
8841                    .unwrap_or_default(),
8842
8843                ..Default::default()
8844            },
8845        )
8846    }
8847}
8848
8849#[doc(hidden)]
8850pub mod testing {
8851    use super::*;
8852
8853    pub struct Pipe {
8854        pub client: Connection,
8855        pub server: Connection,
8856    }
8857
8858    impl Pipe {
8859        pub fn new() -> Result<Pipe> {
8860            let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION)?;
8861            config.load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")?;
8862            config.load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")?;
8863            config.set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])?;
8864            config.set_initial_max_data(30);
8865            config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
8866            config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
8867            config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(10);
8868            config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
8869            config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(3);
8870            config.set_max_idle_timeout(180_000);
8871            config.verify_peer(false);
8872            config.set_ack_delay_exponent(8);
8873
8874            Pipe::with_config(&mut config)
8875        }
8876
8877        pub fn client_addr() -> SocketAddr {
8878            "127.0.0.1:1234".parse().unwrap()
8879        }
8880
8881        pub fn server_addr() -> SocketAddr {
8882            "127.0.0.1:4321".parse().unwrap()
8883        }
8884
8885        pub fn with_config(config: &mut Config) -> Result<Pipe> {
8886            let mut client_scid = [0; 16];
8887            rand::rand_bytes(&mut client_scid[..]);
8888            let client_scid = ConnectionId::from_ref(&client_scid);
8889            let client_addr = Pipe::client_addr();
8890
8891            let mut server_scid = [0; 16];
8892            rand::rand_bytes(&mut server_scid[..]);
8893            let server_scid = ConnectionId::from_ref(&server_scid);
8894            let server_addr = Pipe::server_addr();
8895
8896            Ok(Pipe {
8897                client: connect(
8898                    Some("quic.tech"),
8899                    &client_scid,
8900                    client_addr,
8901                    server_addr,
8902                    config,
8903                )?,
8904                server: accept(
8905                    &server_scid,
8906                    None,
8907                    server_addr,
8908                    client_addr,
8909                    config,
8910                )?,
8911            })
8912        }
8913
8914        pub fn with_config_and_scid_lengths(
8915            config: &mut Config, client_scid_len: usize, server_scid_len: usize,
8916        ) -> Result<Pipe> {
8917            let mut client_scid = vec![0; client_scid_len];
8918            rand::rand_bytes(&mut client_scid[..]);
8919            let client_scid = ConnectionId::from_ref(&client_scid);
8920            let client_addr = Pipe::client_addr();
8921
8922            let mut server_scid = vec![0; server_scid_len];
8923            rand::rand_bytes(&mut server_scid[..]);
8924            let server_scid = ConnectionId::from_ref(&server_scid);
8925            let server_addr = Pipe::server_addr();
8926
8927            Ok(Pipe {
8928                client: connect(
8929                    Some("quic.tech"),
8930                    &client_scid,
8931                    client_addr,
8932                    server_addr,
8933                    config,
8934                )?,
8935                server: accept(
8936                    &server_scid,
8937                    None,
8938                    server_addr,
8939                    client_addr,
8940                    config,
8941                )?,
8942            })
8943        }
8944
8945        pub fn with_client_config(client_config: &mut Config) -> Result<Pipe> {
8946            let mut client_scid = [0; 16];
8947            rand::rand_bytes(&mut client_scid[..]);
8948            let client_scid = ConnectionId::from_ref(&client_scid);
8949            let client_addr = Pipe::client_addr();
8950
8951            let mut server_scid = [0; 16];

8953            let server_scid = ConnectionId::from_ref(&server_scid);
8954            let server_addr = Pipe::server_addr();
8955
8956            let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION)?;
8957            config.load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")?;
8958            config.load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")?;
8959            config.set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])?;
8960            config.set_initial_max_data(30);
8961            config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
8962            config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
8963            config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
8964            config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(3);
8965            config.set_ack_delay_exponent(8);

8973                    client_config,
8974                )?,
8975                server: accept(

8981                )?,
8982            })

8984
8985        pub fn with_server_config(server_config: &mut Config) -> Result<Pipe> {
8986            let mut client_scid = [0; 16];
8987            rand::rand_bytes(&mut client_scid[..]);
8988            let client_scid = ConnectionId::from_ref(&client_scid);
8989            let client_addr = Pipe::client_addr();

8997            config.set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])?;
8998            config.set_initial_max_data(30);
8999            config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
9000            config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
9001            config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
9002            config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(3);
9003            config.set_ack_delay_exponent(8);
9004
9005            Ok(Pipe {

9022
9023        pub fn with_client_and_server_config(
9024            client_config: &mut Config, server_config: &mut Config,
9025        ) -> Result<Pipe> {
9026            let mut client_scid = [0; 16];
9027            rand::rand_bytes(&mut client_scid[..]);
9028            let client_scid = ConnectionId::from_ref(&client_scid);
9029            let client_addr = Pipe::client_addr();
9030
9031            let mut server_scid = [0; 16];
9032            rand::rand_bytes(&mut server_scid[..]);
9033            let server_scid = ConnectionId::from_ref(&server_scid);
9034            let server_addr = Pipe::server_addr();
9035
9036            Ok(Pipe {
9037                client: connect(
9038                    Some("quic.tech"),
9039                    &client_scid,
9040                    client_addr,
9041                    server_addr,
9042                    client_config,
9043                )?,
9044                server: accept(
9045                    &server_scid,
9046                    None,
9047                    server_addr,
9048                    client_addr,
9049                    server_config,
9050                )?,
9051            })
9052        }
9053
9054        pub fn handshake(&mut self) -> Result<()> {
9055            while !self.client.is_established() || !self.server.is_established() {
9056                let flight = emit_flight(&mut self.client)?;
9057                process_flight(&mut self.server, flight)?;
9058
9059                let flight = emit_flight(&mut self.server)?;
9060                process_flight(&mut self.client, flight)?;
9061            }
9062
9063            Ok(())
9064        }
9065
9066        pub fn advance(&mut self) -> Result<()> {
9067            let mut client_done = false;
9068            let mut server_done = false;
9069
9070            while !client_done || !server_done {
9071                match emit_flight(&mut self.client) {
9072                    Ok(flight) => process_flight(&mut self.server, flight)?,
9073
9074                    Err(Error::Done) => client_done = true,
9075
9076                    Err(e) => return Err(e),
9077                };
9078
9079                match emit_flight(&mut self.server) {
9080                    Ok(flight) => process_flight(&mut self.client, flight)?,
9081
9082                    Err(Error::Done) => server_done = true,
9083
9084                    Err(e) => return Err(e),
9085                };
9086            }
9087
9088            Ok(())
9089        }
9090
9091        pub fn client_recv(&mut self, buf: &mut [u8]) -> Result<usize> {
9092            let server_path = &self.server.paths.get_active().unwrap();
9093            let info = RecvInfo {
9094                to: server_path.peer_addr(),
9095                from: server_path.local_addr(),
9096            };
9097
9098            self.client.recv(buf, info)
9099        }
9100
9101        pub fn server_recv(&mut self, buf: &mut [u8]) -> Result<usize> {
9102            let client_path = &self.client.paths.get_active().unwrap();
9103            let info = RecvInfo {
9104                to: client_path.peer_addr(),
9105                from: client_path.local_addr(),
9106            };
9107
9108            self.server.recv(buf, info)
9109        }
9110
9111        pub fn send_pkt_to_server(
9112            &mut self, pkt_type: packet::Type, frames: &[frame::Frame],
9113            buf: &mut [u8],
9114        ) -> Result<usize> {
9115            let written = encode_pkt(&mut self.client, pkt_type, frames, buf)?;
9116            recv_send(&mut self.server, buf, written)
9117        }
9118
9119        pub fn client_update_key(&mut self) -> Result<()> {
9120            let space =
9121                &mut self.client.pkt_num_spaces[packet::Epoch::Application];
9122
9123            let open_next = space
9124                .crypto_open
9125                .as_ref()
9126                .unwrap()
9127                .derive_next_packet_key()
9128                .unwrap();
9129
9130            let seal_next = space
9131                .crypto_seal
9132                .as_ref()
9133                .unwrap()
9134                .derive_next_packet_key()?;
9135
9136            let open_prev = space.crypto_open.replace(open_next);
9137            space.crypto_seal.replace(seal_next);
9138
9139            space.key_update = Some(packet::KeyUpdate {
9140                crypto_open: open_prev.unwrap(),
9141                pn_on_update: self.client.next_pkt_num,
9142                update_acked: true,
9143                timer: time::Instant::now(),
9144            });
9145
9146            self.client.key_phase = !self.client.key_phase;
9147
9148            Ok(())
9149        }
9150    }
9151
9152    pub fn recv_send(
9153        conn: &mut Connection, buf: &mut [u8], len: usize,
9154    ) -> Result<usize> {
9155        let active_path = conn.paths.get_active()?;
9156        let info = RecvInfo {
9157            to: active_path.local_addr(),
9158            from: active_path.peer_addr(),
9159        };
9160
9161        conn.recv(&mut buf[..len], info)?;
9162
9163        let mut off = 0;
9164
9165        match conn.send(&mut buf[off..]) {
9166            Ok((write, _)) => off += write,
9167
9168            Err(Error::Done) => (),
9169
9170            Err(e) => return Err(e),
9171        }
9172
9173        Ok(off)
9174    }
9175
9176    pub fn process_flight(
9177        conn: &mut Connection, flight: Vec<(Vec<u8>, SendInfo)>,
9178    ) -> Result<()> {
9179        for (mut pkt, si) in flight {
9180            let info = RecvInfo {
9181                to: si.to,
9182                from: si.from,
9183            };
9184
9185            conn.recv(&mut pkt, info)?;
9186        }
9187
9188        Ok(())
9189    }
9190
9191    pub fn emit_flight_with_max_buffer(
9192        conn: &mut Connection, out_size: usize, from: Option<SocketAddr>,
9193        to: Option<SocketAddr>,
9194    ) -> Result<Vec<(Vec<u8>, SendInfo)>> {
9195        let mut flight = Vec::new();
9196
9197        loop {
9198            let mut out = vec![0u8; out_size];
9199
9200            let info = match conn.send_on_path(&mut out, from, to) {
9201                Ok((written, info)) => {
9202                    out.truncate(written);
9203                    info
9204                },
9205
9206                Err(Error::Done) => break,
9207
9208                Err(e) => return Err(e),
9209            };
9210
9211            flight.push((out, info));
9212        }
9213
9214        if flight.is_empty() {
9215            return Err(Error::Done);
9216        }
9217
9218        Ok(flight)
9219    }
9220
9221    pub fn emit_flight_on_path(
9222        conn: &mut Connection, from: Option<SocketAddr>, to: Option<SocketAddr>,
9223    ) -> Result<Vec<(Vec<u8>, SendInfo)>> {
9224        emit_flight_with_max_buffer(conn, 65535, from, to)
9225    }
9226
9227    pub fn emit_flight(
9228        conn: &mut Connection,
9229    ) -> Result<Vec<(Vec<u8>, SendInfo)>> {
9230        emit_flight_on_path(conn, None, None)
9231    }
9232
9233    pub fn encode_pkt(
9234        conn: &mut Connection, pkt_type: packet::Type, frames: &[frame::Frame],
9235        buf: &mut [u8],
9236    ) -> Result<usize> {
9237        let mut b = octets::OctetsMut::with_slice(buf);
9238
9239        let epoch = pkt_type.to_epoch()?;
9240
9241        let space = &mut conn.pkt_num_spaces[epoch];
9242
9243        let pn = conn.next_pkt_num;
9244        let pn_len = 4;
9245
9246        let send_path = conn.paths.get_active()?;
9247        let active_dcid_seq = send_path
9248            .active_dcid_seq
9249            .as_ref()
9250            .ok_or(Error::InvalidState)?;
9251        let active_scid_seq = send_path
9252            .active_scid_seq
9253            .as_ref()
9254            .ok_or(Error::InvalidState)?;
9255
9256        let hdr = Header {
9257            ty: pkt_type,
9258            version: conn.version,
9259            dcid: ConnectionId::from_ref(
9260                conn.ids.get_dcid(*active_dcid_seq)?.cid.as_ref(),
9261            ),
9262            scid: ConnectionId::from_ref(
9263                conn.ids.get_scid(*active_scid_seq)?.cid.as_ref(),
9264            ),
9265            pkt_num: pn,
9266            pkt_num_len: pn_len,
9267            token: conn.token.clone(),
9268            versions: None,
9269            key_phase: conn.key_phase,
9270        };
9271
9272        hdr.to_bytes(&mut b)?;
9273
9274        let payload_len = frames.iter().fold(0, |acc, x| acc + x.wire_len());
9275
9276        if pkt_type != packet::Type::Short {
9277            let len = pn_len + payload_len + space.crypto_overhead().unwrap();
9278            b.put_varint(len as u64)?;
9279        }
9280
9281        // Always encode packet number in 4 bytes, to allow encoding packets
9282        // with empty payloads.
9283        b.put_u32(pn as u32)?;
9284
9285        let payload_offset = b.off();
9286
9287        for frame in frames {
9288            frame.to_bytes(&mut b)?;
9289        }
9290
9291        let aead = match space.crypto_seal {
9292            Some(ref v) => v,
9293            None => return Err(Error::InvalidState),
9294        };
9295
9296        let written = packet::encrypt_pkt(
9297            &mut b,
9298            pn,
9299            pn_len,
9300            payload_len,
9301            payload_offset,
9302            None,
9303            aead,
9304        )?;
9305
9306        conn.next_pkt_num += 1;
9307
9308        Ok(written)
9309    }
9310
9311    pub fn decode_pkt(
9312        conn: &mut Connection, buf: &mut [u8],
9313    ) -> Result<Vec<frame::Frame>> {
9314        let mut b = octets::OctetsMut::with_slice(buf);
9315
9316        let mut hdr = Header::from_bytes(&mut b, conn.source_id().len()).unwrap();
9317
9318        let epoch = hdr.ty.to_epoch()?;
9319
9320        let aead = conn.pkt_num_spaces[epoch].crypto_open.as_ref().unwrap();
9321
9322        let payload_len = b.cap();
9323
9324        packet::decrypt_hdr(&mut b, &mut hdr, aead).unwrap();
9325
9326        let pn = packet::decode_pkt_num(
9327            conn.pkt_num_spaces[epoch].largest_rx_pkt_num,
9328            hdr.pkt_num,
9329            hdr.pkt_num_len,
9330        );
9331
9332        let mut payload =
9333            packet::decrypt_pkt(&mut b, pn, hdr.pkt_num_len, payload_len, aead)
9334                .unwrap();
9335
9336        let mut frames = Vec::new();
9337
9338        while payload.cap() > 0 {
9339            let frame = frame::Frame::from_bytes(&mut payload, hdr.ty)?;
9340            frames.push(frame);
9341        }
9342
9343        Ok(frames)
9344    }
9345
9346    pub fn create_cid_and_reset_token(
9347        cid_len: usize,
9348    ) -> (ConnectionId<'static>, u128) {
9349        let mut cid = vec![0; cid_len];
9350        rand::rand_bytes(&mut cid[..]);
9351        let cid = ConnectionId::from_ref(&cid).into_owned();
9352
9353        let mut reset_token = [0; 16];
9354        rand::rand_bytes(&mut reset_token);
9355        let reset_token = u128::from_be_bytes(reset_token);
9356
9357        (cid, reset_token)
9358    }
9359}
9360
9361#[cfg(test)]
9362mod tests {
9363    use super::*;
9364
9365    #[test]
9366    fn transport_params() {
9367        // Server encodes, client decodes.
9368        let tp = TransportParams {
9369            original_destination_connection_id: None,
9370            max_idle_timeout: 30,
9371            stateless_reset_token: Some(u128::from_be_bytes([0xba; 16])),
9372            max_udp_payload_size: 23_421,
9373            initial_max_data: 424_645_563,
9374            initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local: 154_323_123,
9375            initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote: 6_587_456,
9376            initial_max_stream_data_uni: 2_461_234,
9377            initial_max_streams_bidi: 12_231,
9378            initial_max_streams_uni: 18_473,
9379            ack_delay_exponent: 20,
9380            max_ack_delay: 2_u64.pow(14) - 1,
9381            disable_active_migration: true,
9382            active_conn_id_limit: 8,
9383            initial_source_connection_id: Some(b"woot woot".to_vec().into()),
9384            retry_source_connection_id: Some(b"retry".to_vec().into()),
9385            max_datagram_frame_size: Some(32),
9386            unknown_params: Default::default(),
9387        };
9388
9389        let mut raw_params = [42; 256];
9390        let raw_params =
9391            TransportParams::encode(&tp, true, &mut raw_params).unwrap();
9392        assert_eq!(raw_params.len(), 94);
9393
9394        let new_tp = TransportParams::decode(raw_params, false, None).unwrap();
9395
9396        assert_eq!(new_tp, tp);
9397
9398        // Client encodes, server decodes.
9399        let tp = TransportParams {
9400            original_destination_connection_id: None,
9401            max_idle_timeout: 30,
9402            stateless_reset_token: None,
9403            max_udp_payload_size: 23_421,
9404            initial_max_data: 424_645_563,
9405            initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local: 154_323_123,
9406            initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote: 6_587_456,
9407            initial_max_stream_data_uni: 2_461_234,
9408            initial_max_streams_bidi: 12_231,
9409            initial_max_streams_uni: 18_473,
9410            ack_delay_exponent: 20,
9411            max_ack_delay: 2_u64.pow(14) - 1,
9412            disable_active_migration: true,
9413            active_conn_id_limit: 8,
9414            initial_source_connection_id: Some(b"woot woot".to_vec().into()),
9415            retry_source_connection_id: None,
9416            max_datagram_frame_size: Some(32),
9417            unknown_params: Default::default(),
9418        };
9419
9420        let mut raw_params = [42; 256];
9421        let raw_params =
9422            TransportParams::encode(&tp, false, &mut raw_params).unwrap();
9423        assert_eq!(raw_params.len(), 69);
9424
9425        let new_tp = TransportParams::decode(raw_params, true, None).unwrap();
9426
9427        assert_eq!(new_tp, tp);
9428    }
9429
9430    #[test]
9431    fn transport_params_forbid_duplicates() {
9432        // Given an encoded param.
9433        let initial_source_connection_id = b"id";
9434        let initial_source_connection_id_raw = [
9435            15,
9436            initial_source_connection_id.len() as u8,
9437            initial_source_connection_id[0],
9438            initial_source_connection_id[1],
9439        ];
9440
9441        // No error when decoding the param.
9442        let tp = TransportParams::decode(
9443            initial_source_connection_id_raw.as_slice(),
9444            true,
9445            None,
9446        )
9447        .unwrap();
9448
9449        assert_eq!(
9450            tp.initial_source_connection_id,
9451            Some(initial_source_connection_id.to_vec().into())
9452        );
9453
9454        // Duplicate the param.
9455        let mut raw_params = Vec::new();
9456        raw_params.append(&mut initial_source_connection_id_raw.to_vec());
9457        raw_params.append(&mut initial_source_connection_id_raw.to_vec());
9458
9459        // Decoding fails.
9460        assert_eq!(
9461            TransportParams::decode(raw_params.as_slice(), true, None),
9462            Err(Error::InvalidTransportParam)
9463        );
9464    }
9465
9466    #[test]
9467    fn transport_params_unknown_zero_space() {
9468        let mut unknown_params: UnknownTransportParameters =
9469            UnknownTransportParameters {
9470                capacity: 0,
9471                parameters: vec![],
9472            };
9473        let massive_unknown_param = UnknownTransportParameter::<&[u8]> {
9474            id: 5,
9475            value: &[0xau8; 280],
9476        };
9477        assert!(unknown_params.push(massive_unknown_param).is_err());
9478        assert!(unknown_params.capacity == 0);
9479        assert!(unknown_params.parameters.is_empty());
9480    }
9481
9482    #[test]
9483    fn transport_params_unknown_max_space_respected() {
9484        let mut unknown_params: UnknownTransportParameters =
9485            UnknownTransportParameters {
9486                capacity: 256,
9487                parameters: vec![],
9488            };
9489
9490        let massive_unknown_param = UnknownTransportParameter::<&[u8]> {
9491            id: 5,
9492            value: &[0xau8; 280],
9493        };
9494        let big_unknown_param = UnknownTransportParameter::<&[u8]> {
9495            id: 5,
9496            value: &[0xau8; 232],
9497        };
9498        let little_unknown_param = UnknownTransportParameter::<&[u8]> {
9499            id: 6,
9500            value: &[0xau8; 7],
9501        };
9502
9503        assert!(unknown_params.push(massive_unknown_param).is_err());
9504        assert!(unknown_params.capacity == 256);
9505        assert!(unknown_params.parameters.is_empty());
9506
9507        unknown_params.push(big_unknown_param).unwrap();
9508        assert!(unknown_params.capacity == 16);
9509        assert!(unknown_params.parameters.len() == 1);
9510
9511        unknown_params.push(little_unknown_param.clone()).unwrap();
9512        assert!(unknown_params.capacity == 1);
9513        assert!(unknown_params.parameters.len() == 2);
9514
9515        assert!(unknown_params.push(little_unknown_param).is_err());
9516
9517        let mut unknown_params_iter = unknown_params.into_iter();
9518
9519        let unknown_params_first = unknown_params_iter
9520            .next()
9521            .expect("Should have a 0th element.");
9522        assert!(
9523            unknown_params_first.id == 5 &&
9524                unknown_params_first.value == vec![0xau8; 232]
9525        );
9526
9527        let unknown_params_second = unknown_params_iter
9528            .next()
9529            .expect("Should have a 1th element.");
9530        assert!(
9531            unknown_params_second.id == 6 &&
9532                unknown_params_second.value == vec![0xau8; 7]
9533        );
9534    }
9535
9536    #[test]
9537    fn transport_params_unknown_is_reserved() {
9538        let reserved_unknown_param = UnknownTransportParameter::<&[u8]> {
9539            id: 31 * 17 + 27,
9540            value: &[0xau8; 280],
9541        };
9542        let not_reserved_unknown_param = UnknownTransportParameter::<&[u8]> {
9543            id: 32 * 17 + 27,
9544            value: &[0xau8; 280],
9545        };
9546
9547        assert!(reserved_unknown_param.is_reserved());
9548        assert!(!not_reserved_unknown_param.is_reserved());
9549    }
9550    #[test]
9551    fn unknown_version() {
9552        let mut config = Config::new(0xbabababa).unwrap();
9553        config
9554            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
9555            .unwrap();
9556        config.verify_peer(false);
9557
9558        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_client_config(&mut config).unwrap();
9559        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Err(Error::UnknownVersion));
9560    }
9561
9562    #[test]
9563    fn config_version_reserved() {
9564        Config::new(0xbabababa).unwrap();
9565        Config::new(0x1a2a3a4a).unwrap();
9566    }
9567
9568    #[test]
9569    fn config_version_invalid() {
9570        assert_eq!(
9571            Config::new(0xb1bababa).err().unwrap(),
9572            Error::UnknownVersion
9573        );
9574    }
9575
9576    #[test]
9577    fn version_negotiation() {
9578        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
9579
9580        let mut config = Config::new(0xbabababa).unwrap();
9581        config
9582            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
9583            .unwrap();
9584        config.verify_peer(false);
9585
9586        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_client_config(&mut config).unwrap();
9587
9588        let (mut len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
9589
9590        let hdr = packet::Header::from_slice(&mut buf[..len], 0).unwrap();
9591        len = crate::negotiate_version(&hdr.scid, &hdr.dcid, &mut buf).unwrap();
9592
9593        assert_eq!(pipe.client_recv(&mut buf[..len]), Ok(len));
9594
9595        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
9596
9597        assert_eq!(pipe.client.version, PROTOCOL_VERSION);
9598        assert_eq!(pipe.server.version, PROTOCOL_VERSION);
9599    }
9600
9601    #[test]
9602    fn verify_custom_root() {
9603        let mut config = Config::new(PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
9604        config.verify_peer(true);
9605        config
9606            .load_verify_locations_from_file("examples/rootca.crt")
9607            .unwrap();
9608        config
9609            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
9610            .unwrap();
9611
9612        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_client_config(&mut config).unwrap();
9613        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
9614    }
9615
9616    // Disable this for openssl as it seems to fail for some reason. It could be
9617    // because of the way the get_certs API differs from bssl.
9618    #[cfg(not(feature = "openssl"))]
9619    #[test]
9620    fn verify_client_invalid() {
9621        let mut server_config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
9622        server_config
9623            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
9624            .unwrap();
9625        server_config
9626            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
9627            .unwrap();
9628        server_config
9629            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
9630            .unwrap();
9631        server_config.set_initial_max_data(30);
9632        server_config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
9633        server_config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
9634        server_config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
9635
9636        // The server shouldn't be able to verify the client's certificate due
9637        // to missing CA.
9638        server_config.verify_peer(true);
9639
9640        let mut client_config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
9641        client_config
9642            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
9643            .unwrap();
9644        client_config
9645            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
9646            .unwrap();
9647        client_config
9648            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
9649            .unwrap();
9650        client_config.set_initial_max_data(30);
9651        client_config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
9652        client_config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
9653        client_config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
9654
9655        // The client is able to verify the server's certificate with the
9656        // appropriate CA.
9657        client_config
9658            .load_verify_locations_from_file("examples/rootca.crt")
9659            .unwrap();
9660        client_config.verify_peer(true);
9661
9662        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_client_and_server_config(
9663            &mut client_config,
9664            &mut server_config,
9665        )
9666        .unwrap();
9667        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Err(Error::TlsFail));
9668
9669        // Client did send a certificate.
9670        assert!(pipe.server.peer_cert().is_some());
9671    }
9672
9673    #[test]
9674    fn verify_client_anonymous() {
9675        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
9676        config
9677            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
9678            .unwrap();
9679        config
9680            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
9681            .unwrap();
9682        config
9683            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
9684            .unwrap();
9685        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
9686        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
9687        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
9688        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
9689
9690        // Try to validate client certificate.
9691        config.verify_peer(true);
9692
9693        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_server_config(&mut config).unwrap();
9694        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
9695
9696        // Client didn't send a certificate.
9697        assert!(pipe.server.peer_cert().is_none());
9698    }
