9700    #[test]
9701    fn missing_initial_source_connection_id() {
9702        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
9703
9704        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
9705
9706        // Reset initial_source_connection_id.
9707        pipe.client
9708            .local_transport_params
9709            .initial_source_connection_id = None;
9710        assert_eq!(pipe.client.encode_transport_params(), Ok(()));
9711
9712        // Client sends initial flight.
9713        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
9714
9715        // Server rejects transport parameters.
9716        assert_eq!(
9717            pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..len]),
9718            Err(Error::InvalidTransportParam)
9719        );
9720    }
9721
9722    #[test]
9723    fn invalid_initial_source_connection_id() {
9724        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
9725
9726        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
9727
9728        // Scramble initial_source_connection_id.
9729        pipe.client
9730            .local_transport_params
9731            .initial_source_connection_id = Some(b"bogus value".to_vec().into());
9732        assert_eq!(pipe.client.encode_transport_params(), Ok(()));
9733
9734        // Client sends initial flight.
9735        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
9736
9737        // Server rejects transport parameters.
9738        assert_eq!(
9739            pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..len]),
9740            Err(Error::InvalidTransportParam)
9741        );
9742    }
9743
9744    #[test]
9745    fn change_idle_timeout() {
9746        let mut config = Config::new(0x1).unwrap();
9747        config
9748            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
9749            .unwrap();
9750        config.set_max_idle_timeout(999999);
9751        config.verify_peer(false);
9752
9753        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_client_config(&mut config).unwrap();
9754        assert_eq!(pipe.client.local_transport_params.max_idle_timeout, 999999);
9755        assert_eq!(pipe.client.peer_transport_params.max_idle_timeout, 0);
9756        assert_eq!(pipe.server.local_transport_params.max_idle_timeout, 0);
9757        assert_eq!(pipe.server.peer_transport_params.max_idle_timeout, 0);
9758
9759        pipe.client.set_max_idle_timeout(456000).unwrap();
9760        pipe.server.set_max_idle_timeout(234000).unwrap();
9761        assert_eq!(pipe.client.local_transport_params.max_idle_timeout, 456000);
9762        assert_eq!(pipe.client.peer_transport_params.max_idle_timeout, 0);
9763        assert_eq!(pipe.server.local_transport_params.max_idle_timeout, 234000);
9764        assert_eq!(pipe.server.peer_transport_params.max_idle_timeout, 0);
9765
9766        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
9767
9768        assert_eq!(
9769            pipe.client.idle_timeout(),
9770            Some(time::Duration::from_millis(234000))
9771        );
9772        assert_eq!(
9773            pipe.server.idle_timeout(),
9774            Some(time::Duration::from_millis(234000))
9775        );
9776    }
9777
9778    #[test]
9779    fn handshake() {
9780        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
9781        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
9782
9783        assert_eq!(
9784            pipe.client.application_proto(),
9785            pipe.server.application_proto()
9786        );
9787
9788        assert_eq!(pipe.server.server_name(), Some("quic.tech"));
9789    }
9790
9791    #[test]
9792    fn handshake_done() {
9793        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
9794
9795        // Disable session tickets on the server (SSL_OP_NO_TICKET) to avoid
9796        // triggering 1-RTT packet send with a CRYPTO frame.
9797        pipe.server.handshake.set_options(0x0000_4000);
9798
9799        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
9800
9801        assert!(pipe.server.handshake_done_sent);
9802    }
9803
9804    #[test]
9805    fn handshake_confirmation() {
9806        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
9807
9808        // Client sends initial flight.
9809        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
9810        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, flight).unwrap();
9811
9812        // Server sends initial flight.
9813        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).unwrap();
9814
9815        assert!(!pipe.client.is_established());
9816        assert!(!pipe.client.handshake_confirmed);
9817
9818        assert!(!pipe.server.is_established());
9819        assert!(!pipe.server.handshake_confirmed);
9820
9821        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.client, flight).unwrap();
9822
9823        // Client sends Handshake packet and completes handshake.
9824        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
9825
9826        assert!(pipe.client.is_established());
9827        assert!(!pipe.client.handshake_confirmed);
9828
9829        assert!(!pipe.server.is_established());
9830        assert!(!pipe.server.handshake_confirmed);
9831
9832        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, flight).unwrap();
9833
9834        // Server completes and confirms handshake, and sends HANDSHAKE_DONE.
9835        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).unwrap();
9836
9837        assert!(pipe.client.is_established());
9838        assert!(!pipe.client.handshake_confirmed);
9839
9840        assert!(pipe.server.is_established());
9841        assert!(pipe.server.handshake_confirmed);
9842
9843        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.client, flight).unwrap();
9844
9845        // Client acks 1-RTT packet, and confirms handshake.
9846        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
9847
9848        assert!(pipe.client.is_established());
9849        assert!(pipe.client.handshake_confirmed);
9850
9851        assert!(pipe.server.is_established());
9852        assert!(pipe.server.handshake_confirmed);
9853
9854        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, flight).unwrap();
9855
9856        assert!(pipe.client.is_established());
9857        assert!(pipe.client.handshake_confirmed);
9858
9859        assert!(pipe.server.is_established());
9860        assert!(pipe.server.handshake_confirmed);
9861    }
9862
9863    #[test]
9864    fn handshake_resumption() {
9865        #[cfg(not(feature = "openssl"))]
9866        const SESSION_TICKET_KEY: [u8; 48] = [0xa; 48];
9867
9868        // 80-byte key(AES 256)
9869        // TODO: We can set the default? or query the ticket size by calling
9870        // the same API(SSL_CTX_set_tlsext_ticket_keys) twice to fetch the size.
9871        #[cfg(feature = "openssl")]
9872        const SESSION_TICKET_KEY: [u8; 80] = [0xa; 80];
9873
9874        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
9875
9876        config
9877            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
9878            .unwrap();
9879        config
9880            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
9881            .unwrap();
9882        config
9883            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
9884            .unwrap();
9885        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
9886        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
9887        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
9888        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
9889        config.set_ticket_key(&SESSION_TICKET_KEY).unwrap();
9890
9891        // Perform initial handshake.
9892        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_server_config(&mut config).unwrap();
9893        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
9894
9895        assert!(pipe.client.is_established());
9896        assert!(pipe.server.is_established());
9897
9898        assert!(!pipe.client.is_resumed());
9899        assert!(!pipe.server.is_resumed());
9900
9901        // Extract session,
9902        let session = pipe.client.session().unwrap();
9903
9904        // Configure session on new connection and perform handshake.
9905        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
9906        config
9907            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
9908            .unwrap();
9909        config
9910            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
9911            .unwrap();
9912        config
9913            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
9914            .unwrap();
9915        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
9916        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
9917        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
9918        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
9919        config.set_ticket_key(&SESSION_TICKET_KEY).unwrap();
9920
9921        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_server_config(&mut config).unwrap();
9922
9923        assert_eq!(pipe.client.set_session(session), Ok(()));
9924        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
9925
9926        assert!(pipe.client.is_established());
9927        assert!(pipe.server.is_established());
9928
9929        assert!(pipe.client.is_resumed());
9930        assert!(pipe.server.is_resumed());
9931    }
9932
9933    #[test]
9934    fn handshake_alpn_mismatch() {
9935        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
9936
9937        let mut config = Config::new(PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
9938        config
9939            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto3\x06proto4"])
9940            .unwrap();
9941        config.verify_peer(false);
9942
9943        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_client_config(&mut config).unwrap();
9944        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Err(Error::TlsFail));
9945
9946        assert_eq!(pipe.client.application_proto(), b"");
9947        assert_eq!(pipe.server.application_proto(), b"");
9948
9949        // Server should only send one packet in response to ALPN mismatch.
9950        let (len, _) = pipe.server.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
9951        assert_eq!(len, 1200);
9952
9953        assert_eq!(pipe.server.send(&mut buf), Err(Error::Done));
9954        assert_eq!(pipe.server.sent_count, 1);
9955    }
9956
9957    #[cfg(not(feature = "openssl"))] // 0-RTT not supported when using openssl/quictls
9958    #[test]
9959    fn handshake_0rtt() {
9960        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
9961
9962        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
9963        config
9964            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
9965            .unwrap();
9966        config
9967            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
9968            .unwrap();
9969        config
9970            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
9971            .unwrap();
9972        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
9973        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
9974        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
9975        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
9976        config.enable_early_data();
9977        config.verify_peer(false);
9978
9979        // Perform initial handshake.
9980        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
9981        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
9982
9983        // Extract session,
9984        let session = pipe.client.session().unwrap();
9985
9986        // Configure session on new connection.
9987        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
9988        assert_eq!(pipe.client.set_session(session), Ok(()));
9989
9990        // Client sends initial flight.
9991        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
9992        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..len]), Ok(len));
9993
9994        // Client sends 0-RTT packet.
9995        let pkt_type = packet::Type::ZeroRTT;
9996
9997        let frames = [frame::Frame::Stream {
9998            stream_id: 4,
9999            data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"aaaaa", 0, true),
10000        }];
10001
10002        assert_eq!(
10003            pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf),
10004            Ok(1200)
10005        );
10006
10007        assert_eq!(pipe.server.undecryptable_pkts.len(), 0);
10008
10009        // 0-RTT stream data is readable.
10010        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
10011        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(4));
10012        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
10013
10014        let mut b = [0; 15];
10015        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut b), Ok((5, true)));
10016        assert_eq!(&b[..5], b"aaaaa");
10017    }
10018
10019    #[cfg(not(feature = "openssl"))] // 0-RTT not supported when using openssl/quictls
10020    #[test]
10021    fn handshake_0rtt_reordered() {
10022        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10023
10024        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
10025        config
10026            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
10027            .unwrap();
10028        config
10029            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
10030            .unwrap();
10031        config
10032            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
10033            .unwrap();
10034        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
10035        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
10036        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
10037        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
10038        config.enable_early_data();
10039        config.verify_peer(false);
10040
10041        // Perform initial handshake.
10042        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
10043        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10044
10045        // Extract session,
10046        let session = pipe.client.session().unwrap();
10047
10048        // Configure session on new connection.
10049        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
10050        assert_eq!(pipe.client.set_session(session), Ok(()));
10051
10052        // Client sends initial flight.
10053        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
10054        let mut initial = buf[..len].to_vec();
10055
10056        // Client sends 0-RTT packet.
10057        let pkt_type = packet::Type::ZeroRTT;
10058
10059        let frames = [frame::Frame::Stream {
10060            stream_id: 4,
10061            data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"aaaaa", 0, true),
10062        }];
10063
10064        let len =
10065            testing::encode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
10066                .unwrap();
10067        let mut zrtt = buf[..len].to_vec();
10068
10069        // 0-RTT packet is received before the Initial one.
10070        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut zrtt), Ok(zrtt.len()));
10071
10072        assert_eq!(pipe.server.undecryptable_pkts.len(), 1);
10073        assert_eq!(pipe.server.undecryptable_pkts[0].0.len(), zrtt.len());
10074
10075        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
10076        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
10077
10078        // Initial packet is also received.
10079        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut initial), Ok(initial.len()));
10080
10081        // 0-RTT stream data is readable.
10082        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
10083        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(4));
10084        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
10085
10086        let mut b = [0; 15];
10087        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut b), Ok((5, true)));
10088        assert_eq!(&b[..5], b"aaaaa");
10089    }
10090
10091    #[cfg(not(feature = "openssl"))] // 0-RTT not supported when using openssl/quictls
10092    #[test]
10093    fn handshake_0rtt_truncated() {
10094        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10095
10096        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
10097        config
10098            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
10099            .unwrap();
10100        config
10101            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
10102            .unwrap();
10103        config
10104            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
10105            .unwrap();
10106        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
10107        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
10108        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
10109        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
10110        config.enable_early_data();
10111        config.verify_peer(false);
10112
10113        // Perform initial handshake.
10114        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
10115        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10116
10117        // Extract session,
10118        let session = pipe.client.session().unwrap();
10119
10120        // Configure session on new connection.
10121        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
10122        assert_eq!(pipe.client.set_session(session), Ok(()));
10123
10124        // Client sends initial flight.
10125        pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
10126
10127        // Client sends 0-RTT packet.
10128        let pkt_type = packet::Type::ZeroRTT;
10129
10130        let frames = [frame::Frame::Stream {
10131            stream_id: 4,
10132            data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"aaaaa", 0, true),
10133        }];
10134
10135        let len =
10136            testing::encode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
10137                .unwrap();
10138
10139        // Simulate a truncated packet by sending one byte less.
10140        let mut zrtt = buf[..len - 1].to_vec();
10141
10142        // 0-RTT packet is received before the Initial one.
10143        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut zrtt), Err(Error::InvalidPacket));
10144
10145        assert_eq!(pipe.server.undecryptable_pkts.len(), 0);
10146
10147        assert!(pipe.server.is_closed());
10148    }
10149
10150    #[test]
10151    fn crypto_limit() {
10152        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10153
10154        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
10155        config
10156            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
10157            .unwrap();
10158        config
10159            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
10160            .unwrap();
10161        config
10162            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
10163            .unwrap();
10164        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
10165        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
10166        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
10167        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
10168        config.enable_early_data();
10169        config.verify_peer(false);
10170
10171        // Perform initial handshake.
10172        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
10173        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10174
10175        // Client send a 1-byte frame that starts from the crypto stream offset
10176        // limit.
10177        let frames = [frame::Frame::Crypto {
10178            data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", MAX_CRYPTO_STREAM_OFFSET, false),
10179        }];
10180
10181        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10182
10183        let written =
10184            testing::encode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
10185                .unwrap();
10186
10187        let active_path = pipe.server.paths.get_active().unwrap();
10188        let info = RecvInfo {
10189            to: active_path.local_addr(),
10190            from: active_path.peer_addr(),
10191        };
10192
10193        assert_eq!(
10194            pipe.server.recv(&mut buf[..written], info),
10195            Err(Error::CryptoBufferExceeded)
10196        );
10197
10198        let written = match pipe.server.send(&mut buf) {
10199            Ok((write, _)) => write,
10200
10201            Err(_) => unreachable!(),
10202        };
10203
10204        let frames =
10205            testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..written]).unwrap();
10206        let mut iter = frames.iter();
10207
10208        assert_eq!(
10209            iter.next(),
10210            Some(&frame::Frame::ConnectionClose {
10211                error_code: 0x0d,
10212                frame_type: 0,
10213                reason: Vec::new(),
10214            })
10215        );
10216    }
10217
10218    #[test]
10219    fn limit_handshake_data() {
10220        let mut config = Config::new(PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
10221        config
10222            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert-big.crt")
10223            .unwrap();
10224        config
10225            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
10226            .unwrap();
10227        config
10228            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
10229            .unwrap();
10230
10231        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_server_config(&mut config).unwrap();
10232
10233        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
10234        let client_sent = flight.iter().fold(0, |out, p| out + p.0.len());
10235        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, flight).unwrap();
10236
10237        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).unwrap();
10238        let server_sent = flight.iter().fold(0, |out, p| out + p.0.len());
10239
10240        assert_eq!(server_sent, client_sent * MAX_AMPLIFICATION_FACTOR);
10241    }
10242
10243    #[test]
10244    fn custom_limit_handshake_data() {
10245        const CUSTOM_AMPLIFICATION_FACTOR: usize = 2;
10246
10247        let mut config = Config::new(PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
10248        config
10249            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert-big.crt")
10250            .unwrap();
10251        config
10252            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
10253            .unwrap();
10254        config
10255            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
10256            .unwrap();
10257        config.set_max_amplification_factor(CUSTOM_AMPLIFICATION_FACTOR);
10258
10259        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_server_config(&mut config).unwrap();
10260
10261        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
10262        let client_sent = flight.iter().fold(0, |out, p| out + p.0.len());
10263        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, flight).unwrap();
10264
10265        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).unwrap();
10266        let server_sent = flight.iter().fold(0, |out, p| out + p.0.len());
10267
10268        assert_eq!(server_sent, client_sent * CUSTOM_AMPLIFICATION_FACTOR);
10269    }
10270
10271    #[test]
10272    fn stream() {
10273        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10274        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10275
10276        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"hello, world", true), Ok(12));
10277        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
10278
10279        assert!(!pipe.server.stream_finished(4));
10280
10281        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
10282        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(4));
10283        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
10284
10285        let mut b = [0; 15];
10286        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut b), Ok((12, true)));
10287        assert_eq!(&b[..12], b"hello, world");
10288
10289        assert!(pipe.server.stream_finished(4));
10290    }
10291
10292    #[cfg(not(feature = "openssl"))] // 0-RTT not supported when using openssl/quictls
10293    #[test]
10294    fn zero_rtt() {
10295        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10296
10297        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
10298        config
10299            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
10300            .unwrap();
10301        config
10302            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
10303            .unwrap();
10304        config
10305            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
10306            .unwrap();
10307        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
10308        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
10309        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
10310        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
10311        config.enable_early_data();
10312        config.verify_peer(false);
10313
10314        // Perform initial handshake.
10315        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
10316        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10317
10318        // Extract session,
10319        let session = pipe.client.session().unwrap();
10320
10321        // Configure session on new connection.
10322        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
10323        assert_eq!(pipe.client.set_session(session), Ok(()));
10324
10325        // Client sends initial flight.
10326        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
10327        let mut initial = buf[..len].to_vec();
10328
10329        assert!(pipe.client.is_in_early_data());
10330
10331        // Client sends 0-RTT data.
10332        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"hello, world", true), Ok(12));
10333
10334        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
10335        let mut zrtt = buf[..len].to_vec();
10336
10337        // Server receives packets.
10338        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut initial), Ok(initial.len()));
10339        assert!(pipe.server.is_in_early_data());
10340
10341        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut zrtt), Ok(zrtt.len()));
10342
10343        // 0-RTT stream data is readable.
10344        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
10345        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(4));
10346        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
10347
10348        let mut b = [0; 15];
10349        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut b), Ok((12, true)));
10350        assert_eq!(&b[..12], b"hello, world");
10351    }
10352
10353    #[test]
10354    fn stream_send_on_32bit_arch() {
10355        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
10356        config
10357            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
10358            .unwrap();
10359        config
10360            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
10361            .unwrap();
10362        config
10363            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
10364            .unwrap();
10365        config.set_initial_max_data(2_u64.pow(32) + 5);
10366        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
10367        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
10368        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(10);
10369        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
10370        config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(0);
10371        config.verify_peer(false);
10372
10373        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
10374        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10375
10376        // In 32bit arch, send_capacity() should be min(2^32+5, cwnd),
10377        // not min(5, cwnd)
10378        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"hello, world", true), Ok(12));
10379
10380        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
10381
10382        assert!(!pipe.server.stream_finished(4));
10383    }
10384
10385    #[test]
10386    fn empty_stream_frame() {
10387        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10388
10389        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10390        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10391
10392        let frames = [frame::Frame::Stream {
10393            stream_id: 4,
10394            data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"aaaaa", 0, false),
10395        }];
10396
10397        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10398        assert_eq!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf), Ok(39));
10399
10400        let mut readable = pipe.server.readable();
10401        assert_eq!(readable.next(), Some(4));
10402
10403        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut buf), Ok((5, false)));
10404
10405        let frames = [frame::Frame::Stream {
10406            stream_id: 4,
10407            data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"", 5, true),
10408        }];
10409
10410        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10411        assert_eq!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf), Ok(39));
10412
10413        let mut readable = pipe.server.readable();
10414        assert_eq!(readable.next(), Some(4));
10415
10416        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut buf), Ok((0, true)));
10417
10418        let frames = [frame::Frame::Stream {
10419            stream_id: 4,
10420            data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"", 15, true),
10421        }];
10422
10423        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10424        assert_eq!(
10425            pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf),
10426            Err(Error::FinalSize)
10427        );
10428    }
10429
10430    #[test]
10431    fn update_key_request() {
10432        let mut b = [0; 15];
10433
10434        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10435        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10436        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
10437
10438        // Client sends message with key update request.
10439        assert_eq!(pipe.client_update_key(), Ok(()));
10440        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"hello", false), Ok(5));
10441        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
10442
10443        // Ensure server updates key and it correctly decrypts the message.
10444        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
10445        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(4));
10446        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
10447        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut b), Ok((5, false)));
10448        assert_eq!(&b[..5], b"hello");
10449
10450        // Ensure ACK for key update.
10451        assert!(
10452            pipe.server.pkt_num_spaces[packet::Epoch::Application]
10453                .key_update
10454                .as_ref()
10455                .unwrap()
10456                .update_acked
10457        );
10458
10459        // Server sends message with the new key.
10460        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(4, b"world", false), Ok(5));
10461        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
10462
10463        // Ensure update key is completed and client can decrypt packet.
10464        let mut r = pipe.client.readable();
10465        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(4));
10466        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
10467        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_recv(4, &mut b), Ok((5, false)));
10468        assert_eq!(&b[..5], b"world");
10469
10470        // Server keeps sending packets to ensure encryption still works.
10471        for _ in 0..10 {
10472            assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(4, b"world", false), Ok(5));
10473            assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
10474
10475            let mut r = pipe.client.readable();
10476            assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(4));
10477            assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
10478            assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_recv(4, &mut b), Ok((5, false)));
10479            assert_eq!(&b[..5], b"world");
10480        }
10481    }
10482
10483    #[test]
10484    fn update_key_request_twice_error() {
10485        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10486
10487        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10488        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10489        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
10490
10491        let frames = [frame::Frame::Stream {
10492            stream_id: 4,
10493            data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"hello", 0, false),
10494        }];
10495
10496        // Client sends stream frame with key update request.
10497        assert_eq!(pipe.client_update_key(), Ok(()));
10498        let written = testing::encode_pkt(
10499            &mut pipe.client,
10500            packet::Type::Short,
10501            &frames,
10502            &mut buf,
10503        )
10504        .unwrap();
10505
10506        // Server correctly decode with new key.
10507        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..written]), Ok(written));
10508
10509        // Client sends stream frame with another key update request before server
10510        // ACK.
10511        assert_eq!(pipe.client_update_key(), Ok(()));
10512        let written = testing::encode_pkt(
10513            &mut pipe.client,
10514            packet::Type::Short,
10515            &frames,
10516            &mut buf,
10517        )
10518        .unwrap();
10519
10520        // Check server correctly closes the connection with a key update error
10521        // for the peer.
10522        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..written]), Err(Error::KeyUpdate));
10523    }
10524
10525    #[test]
10526    /// Tests that receiving a MAX_STREAM_DATA frame for a receive-only
10527    /// unidirectional stream is forbidden.
10528    fn max_stream_data_receive_uni() {
10529        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10530
10531        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10532        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10533
10534        // Client opens unidirectional stream.
10535        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(2, b"hello", false), Ok(5));
10536        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
10537
10538        // Client sends MAX_STREAM_DATA on local unidirectional stream.
10539        let frames = [frame::Frame::MaxStreamData {
10540            stream_id: 2,
10541            max: 1024,
10542        }];
10543
10544        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10545        assert_eq!(
10546            pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf),
10547            Err(Error::InvalidStreamState(2)),
10548        );
10549    }
10550
10551    #[test]
10552    fn empty_payload() {
10553        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10554
10555        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10556        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10557
10558        // Send a packet with no frames.
10559        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10560        assert_eq!(
10561            pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &[], &mut buf),
10562            Err(Error::InvalidPacket)
10563        );
10564    }
10565
10566    #[test]
10567    fn min_payload() {
10568        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10569
10570        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10571
10572        // Send a non-ack-eliciting packet.
10573        let frames = [frame::Frame::Padding { len: 4 }];
10574
10575        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Initial;
10576        let written =
10577            testing::encode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
10578                .unwrap();
10579        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..written]), Ok(written));
10580
10581        let initial_path = pipe
10582            .server
10583            .paths
10584            .get_active()
10585            .expect("initial path not found");
10586
10587        assert_eq!(initial_path.max_send_bytes, 195);
10588
10589        // Force server to send a single PING frame.
10590        pipe.server
10591            .paths
10592            .get_active_mut()
10593            .expect("no active path")
10594            .recovery
10595            .inc_loss_probes(packet::Epoch::Initial);
10596
10597        let initial_path = pipe
10598            .server
10599            .paths
10600            .get_active_mut()
10601            .expect("initial path not found");
10602
10603        // Artificially limit the amount of bytes the server can send.
10604        initial_path.max_send_bytes = 60;
10605
10606        assert_eq!(pipe.server.send(&mut buf), Err(Error::Done));
10607    }
10608
10609    #[test]
10610    fn flow_control_limit() {
10611        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10612
10613        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10614        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10615
10616        let frames = [
10617            frame::Frame::Stream {
10618                stream_id: 0,
10619                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa", 0, false),
10620            },
10621            frame::Frame::Stream {
10622                stream_id: 4,
10623                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa", 0, false),
10624            },
10625            frame::Frame::Stream {
10626                stream_id: 8,
10627                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", 0, false),
10628            },
10629        ];
10630
10631        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10632        assert_eq!(
10633            pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf),
10634            Err(Error::FlowControl),
10635        );
10636    }
10637
10638    #[test]
10639    fn flow_control_limit_dup() {
10640        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10641
10642        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10643        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10644
10645        let frames = [
10646            // One byte less than stream limit.
10647            frame::Frame::Stream {
10648                stream_id: 0,
10649                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"aaaaaaaaaaaaaa", 0, false),
10650            },
10651            // Same stream, but one byte more.
10652            frame::Frame::Stream {
10653                stream_id: 0,
10654                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa", 0, false),
10655            },
10656            frame::Frame::Stream {
10657                stream_id: 8,
10658                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa", 0, false),
10659            },
10660        ];
10661
10662        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10663        assert!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf).is_ok());
10664    }
10665
10666    #[test]
10667    fn flow_control_update() {
10668        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10669
10670        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10671        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10672
10673        let frames = [
10674            frame::Frame::Stream {
10675                stream_id: 0,
10676                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa", 0, false),
10677            },
10678            frame::Frame::Stream {
10679                stream_id: 4,
10680                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", 0, false),
10681            },
10682        ];
10683
10684        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10685
10686        assert!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf).is_ok());
10687
10688        pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut buf).unwrap();
10689        pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut buf).unwrap();
10690
10691        let frames = [frame::Frame::Stream {
10692            stream_id: 4,
10693            data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", 1, false),
10694        }];
10695
10696        let len = pipe
10697            .send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
10698            .unwrap();
10699
10700        assert!(len > 0);
10701
10702        let frames =
10703            testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
10704        let mut iter = frames.iter();
10705
10706        // Ignore ACK.
10707        iter.next().unwrap();
10708
10709        assert_eq!(
10710            iter.next(),
10711            Some(&frame::Frame::MaxStreamData {
10712                stream_id: 0,
10713                max: 30
10714            })
10715        );
10716        assert_eq!(iter.next(), Some(&frame::Frame::MaxData { max: 61 }));
10717    }
10718
10719    #[test]
10720    /// Tests that flow control is properly updated even when a stream is shut
10721    /// down.
10722    fn flow_control_drain() {
10723        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10724        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10725
10726        // Client opens a stream and sends some data.
10727        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"aaaaa", false), Ok(5));
10728        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
10729
10730        // Server receives data, without reading it.
10731        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
10732        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(4));
10733        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
10734
10735        // In the meantime, client sends more data.
10736        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"aaaaa", false), Ok(5));
10737        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"aaaaa", true), Ok(5));
10738
10739        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(8, b"aaaaa", false), Ok(5));
10740        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(8, b"aaaaa", false), Ok(5));
10741        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(8, b"aaaaa", true), Ok(5));
10742
10743        // Server shuts down one stream.
10744        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_shutdown(4, Shutdown::Read, 42), Ok(()));
10745
10746        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
10747        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
10748
10749        // Flush connection.
10750        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
10751    }
10752
10753    #[test]
10754    fn stream_flow_control_limit_bidi() {

10763        }];

10766        assert_eq!(
10767            pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf),
10768            Err(Error::FlowControl),

10791    #[test]
10792    fn stream_flow_control_update() {
10793        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10794
10795        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10796        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10797
10798        let frames = [frame::Frame::Stream {
10799            stream_id: 4,
10800            data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"aaaaaaaaa", 0, false),
10801        }];
10802
10803        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10804
10805        assert!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf).is_ok());
10806
10807        pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut buf).unwrap();
10808
10809        let frames = [frame::Frame::Stream {
10810            stream_id: 4,
10811            data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", 9, false),
10812        }];
10813
10814        let len = pipe
10815            .send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
10816            .unwrap();
10817
10818        assert!(len > 0);
10819
10820        let frames =
10821            testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
10822        let mut iter = frames.iter();
10823
10824        // Ignore ACK.
10825        iter.next().unwrap();
10826
10827        assert_eq!(
10828            iter.next(),
10829            Some(&frame::Frame::MaxStreamData {
10830                stream_id: 4,
10831                max: 24,
10832            })
10833        );
10834    }

10836    #[test]
10837    fn stream_left_bidi() {
10838        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10839
10840        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10841        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10842
10843        assert_eq!(3, pipe.client.peer_streams_left_bidi());
10844        assert_eq!(3, pipe.server.peer_streams_left_bidi());
10845
10846        pipe.server.stream_send(1, b"a", false).ok();
10847        assert_eq!(2, pipe.server.peer_streams_left_bidi());
10848        pipe.server.stream_send(5, b"a", false).ok();
10849        assert_eq!(1, pipe.server.peer_streams_left_bidi());
10850
10851        pipe.server.stream_send(9, b"a", false).ok();
10852        assert_eq!(0, pipe.server.peer_streams_left_bidi());
10853
10854        let frames = [frame::Frame::MaxStreamsBidi { max: MAX_STREAM_ID }];
10855
10856        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10857        assert!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf).is_ok());
10858
10859        assert_eq!(MAX_STREAM_ID - 3, pipe.server.peer_streams_left_bidi());
10860    }
10861
10862    #[test]
10863    fn stream_left_uni() {
10864        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10865
10866        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10867        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10868
10869        assert_eq!(3, pipe.client.peer_streams_left_uni());
10870        assert_eq!(3, pipe.server.peer_streams_left_uni());
10871
10872        pipe.server.stream_send(3, b"a", false).ok();
10873        assert_eq!(2, pipe.server.peer_streams_left_uni());
10874        pipe.server.stream_send(7, b"a", false).ok();
10875        assert_eq!(1, pipe.server.peer_streams_left_uni());
10876
10877        pipe.server.stream_send(11, b"a", false).ok();
10878        assert_eq!(0, pipe.server.peer_streams_left_uni());
10879
10880        let frames = [frame::Frame::MaxStreamsUni { max: MAX_STREAM_ID }];
10881
10882        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10883        assert!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf).is_ok());
10884
10885        assert_eq!(MAX_STREAM_ID - 3, pipe.server.peer_streams_left_uni());
10886    }

10888    #[test]
10889    fn stream_limit_bidi() {
10890        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10891
10892        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10893        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10894
10895        let frames = [
10896            frame::Frame::Stream {
10897                stream_id: 4,
10898                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", 0, false),
10899            },
10900            frame::Frame::Stream {
10901                stream_id: 8,
10902                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", 0, false),
10903            },
10904            frame::Frame::Stream {
10905                stream_id: 12,
10906                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", 0, false),
10907            },
10908            frame::Frame::Stream {
10909                stream_id: 16,
10910                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", 0, false),
10911            },
10912            frame::Frame::Stream {
10913                stream_id: 20,
10914                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", 0, false),
10915            },
10916            frame::Frame::Stream {
10917                stream_id: 24,
10918                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", 0, false),
10919            },
10920            frame::Frame::Stream {
10921                stream_id: 28,
10922                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", 0, false),
10923            },
10924        ];
10925
10926        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10927        assert_eq!(
10928            pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf),
10929            Err(Error::StreamLimit),
10930        );

10933    #[test]
10934    fn stream_limit_max_bidi() {
10935        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
10936
10937        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
10938        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
10939
10940        let frames = [frame::Frame::MaxStreamsBidi { max: MAX_STREAM_ID }];
10941
10942        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10943        assert!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf).is_ok());
10944
10945        let frames = [frame::Frame::MaxStreamsBidi {
10946            max: MAX_STREAM_ID + 1,
10947        }];
10948
10949        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
10950        assert_eq!(
10951            pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf),
10952            Err(Error::InvalidFrame),
10953        );
10954    }

11001    #[test]
11002    fn stream_limit_max_uni() {
11003        let mut buf = [0; 65535];

11005        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11006        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));

11011        assert!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf).is_ok());
11012

11019            pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf),
11020            Err(Error::InvalidFrame),

11024    #[test]
11025    fn stream_left_reset_bidi() {
11026        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11027
11028        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11029        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11030
11031        assert_eq!(3, pipe.client.peer_streams_left_bidi());
11032        assert_eq!(3, pipe.server.peer_streams_left_bidi());
11033
11034        pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"a", false).ok();
11035        assert_eq!(2, pipe.client.peer_streams_left_bidi());
11036        pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"a", false).ok();
11037        assert_eq!(1, pipe.client.peer_streams_left_bidi());
11038        pipe.client.stream_send(8, b"a", false).ok();
11039        assert_eq!(0, pipe.client.peer_streams_left_bidi());
11040
11041        // Client resets the stream.
11042        pipe.client
11043            .stream_shutdown(0, Shutdown::Write, 1001)
11044            .unwrap();
11045        pipe.advance().unwrap();
11046
11047        assert_eq!(0, pipe.client.peer_streams_left_bidi());
11048        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11049        assert_eq!(Some(0), r.next());
11050        assert_eq!(Some(4), r.next());
11051        assert_eq!(Some(8), r.next());
11052        assert_eq!(None, r.next());
11053
11054        assert_eq!(
11055            pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut buf),
11056            Err(Error::StreamReset(1001))
11057        );
11058
11059        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11060        assert_eq!(Some(4), r.next());
11061        assert_eq!(Some(8), r.next());
11062        assert_eq!(None, r.next());
11063
11064        // Server resets the stream in reaction.
11065        pipe.server
11066            .stream_shutdown(0, Shutdown::Write, 1001)
11067            .unwrap();
11068        pipe.advance().unwrap();
11069
11070        assert_eq!(1, pipe.client.peer_streams_left_bidi());
11071
11072        // Repeat for the other 2 streams
11073        pipe.client
11074            .stream_shutdown(4, Shutdown::Write, 1001)
11075            .unwrap();
11076        pipe.client
11077            .stream_shutdown(8, Shutdown::Write, 1001)
11078            .unwrap();
11079        pipe.advance().unwrap();
11080
11081        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11082        assert_eq!(Some(4), r.next());
11083        assert_eq!(Some(8), r.next());
11084        assert_eq!(None, r.next());
11085
11086        assert_eq!(
11087            pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut buf),
11088            Err(Error::StreamReset(1001))
11089        );
11090
11091        assert_eq!(
11092            pipe.server.stream_recv(8, &mut buf),
11093            Err(Error::StreamReset(1001))
11094        );
11095
11096        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11097        assert_eq!(None, r.next());
11098
11099        pipe.server
11100            .stream_shutdown(4, Shutdown::Write, 1001)
11101            .unwrap();
11102        pipe.server
11103            .stream_shutdown(8, Shutdown::Write, 1001)
11104            .unwrap();
11105        pipe.advance().unwrap();
11106
11107        assert_eq!(3, pipe.client.peer_streams_left_bidi());
11108    }
11109
11110    #[test]
11111    fn stream_reset_counts() {
11112        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11113        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11114
11115        pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"a", false).ok();
11116        pipe.client.stream_send(2, b"a", false).ok();
11117        pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"a", false).ok();
11118        pipe.client.stream_send(8, b"a", false).ok();
11119        pipe.advance().unwrap();
11120
11121        let stats = pipe.client.stats();
11122        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_local, 0);
11123
11124        // Client resets the stream.
11125        pipe.client
11126            .stream_shutdown(0, Shutdown::Write, 1001)
11127            .unwrap();
11128        pipe.advance().unwrap();
11129
11130        let stats = pipe.client.stats();
11131        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_local, 1);
11132        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_remote, 0);
11133        let stats = pipe.server.stats();
11134        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_local, 0);
11135        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_remote, 1);
11136
11137        // Server resets the stream in reaction.
11138        pipe.server
11139            .stream_shutdown(0, Shutdown::Write, 1001)
11140            .unwrap();
11141        pipe.advance().unwrap();
11142
11143        let stats = pipe.client.stats();
11144        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_local, 1);
11145        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_remote, 1);
11146        let stats = pipe.server.stats();
11147        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_local, 1);
11148        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_remote, 1);
11149
11150        // Repeat for the other streams
11151        pipe.client
11152            .stream_shutdown(2, Shutdown::Write, 1001)
11153            .unwrap();
11154        pipe.client
11155            .stream_shutdown(4, Shutdown::Write, 1001)
11156            .unwrap();
11157        pipe.client
11158            .stream_shutdown(8, Shutdown::Write, 1001)
11159            .unwrap();
11160        pipe.advance().unwrap();
11161
11162        pipe.server
11163            .stream_shutdown(4, Shutdown::Write, 1001)
11164            .unwrap();
11165        pipe.server
11166            .stream_shutdown(8, Shutdown::Write, 1001)
11167            .unwrap();
11168        pipe.advance().unwrap();
11169
11170        let stats = pipe.client.stats();
11171        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_local, 4);
11172        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_remote, 3);
11173        let stats = pipe.server.stats();
11174        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_local, 3);
11175        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_remote, 4);
11176    }
11177
11178    #[test]
11179    fn stream_stop_counts() {
11180        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11181        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11182
11183        pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"a", false).ok();
11184        pipe.client.stream_send(2, b"a", false).ok();
11185        pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"a", false).ok();
11186        pipe.client.stream_send(8, b"a", false).ok();
11187        pipe.advance().unwrap();
11188
11189        let stats = pipe.client.stats();
11190        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_local, 0);
11191
11192        // Server stops the stream and client automatically resets.
11193        pipe.server
11194            .stream_shutdown(0, Shutdown::Read, 1001)
11195            .unwrap();
11196        pipe.advance().unwrap();
11197
11198        let stats = pipe.client.stats();
11199        assert_eq!(stats.stopped_stream_count_local, 0);
11200        assert_eq!(stats.stopped_stream_count_remote, 1);
11201        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_local, 1);
11202        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_remote, 0);
11203
11204        let stats = pipe.server.stats();
11205        assert_eq!(stats.stopped_stream_count_local, 1);
11206        assert_eq!(stats.stopped_stream_count_remote, 0);
11207        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_local, 0);
11208        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_remote, 1);
11209
11210        // Repeat for the other streams
11211        pipe.server
11212            .stream_shutdown(2, Shutdown::Read, 1001)
11213            .unwrap();
11214        pipe.server
11215            .stream_shutdown(4, Shutdown::Read, 1001)
11216            .unwrap();
11217        pipe.server
11218            .stream_shutdown(8, Shutdown::Read, 1001)
11219            .unwrap();
11220        pipe.advance().unwrap();
11221
11222        let stats = pipe.client.stats();
11223        assert_eq!(stats.stopped_stream_count_local, 0);
11224        assert_eq!(stats.stopped_stream_count_remote, 4);
11225        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_local, 4);
11226        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_remote, 0);
11227
11228        let stats = pipe.server.stats();
11229        assert_eq!(stats.stopped_stream_count_local, 4);
11230        assert_eq!(stats.stopped_stream_count_remote, 0);
11231        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_local, 0);
11232        assert_eq!(stats.reset_stream_count_remote, 4);
11233    }
11234
11235    #[test]
11236    fn streams_blocked_max_bidi() {
11237        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11238
11239        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11240        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11241
11242        let frames = [frame::Frame::StreamsBlockedBidi {
11243            limit: MAX_STREAM_ID,
11244        }];
11245
11246        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11247        assert!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf).is_ok());
11248
11249        let frames = [frame::Frame::StreamsBlockedBidi {
11250            limit: MAX_STREAM_ID + 1,
11251        }];
11252
11253        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11254        assert_eq!(
11255            pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf),
11256            Err(Error::InvalidFrame),
11257        );
11258    }
11259
11260    #[test]
11261    fn streams_blocked_max_uni() {
11262        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11263
11264        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11265        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11266
11267        let frames = [frame::Frame::StreamsBlockedUni {
11268            limit: MAX_STREAM_ID,
11269        }];
11270
11271        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11272        assert!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf).is_ok());
11273
11274        let frames = [frame::Frame::StreamsBlockedUni {
11275            limit: MAX_STREAM_ID + 1,
11276        }];
11277
11278        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11279        assert_eq!(
11280            pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf),
11281            Err(Error::InvalidFrame),
11282        );
11283    }
11284
11285    #[test]
11286    fn stream_data_overlap() {
11287        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11288
11289        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11290        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11291
11292        let frames = [
11293            frame::Frame::Stream {
11294                stream_id: 0,
11295                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"aaaaa", 0, false),
11296            },
11297            frame::Frame::Stream {
11298                stream_id: 0,
11299                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"bbbbb", 3, false),
11300            },
11301            frame::Frame::Stream {
11302                stream_id: 0,
11303                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"ccccc", 6, false),
11304            },
11305        ];
11306
11307        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11308        assert!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf).is_ok());
11309
11310        let mut b = [0; 15];
11311        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut b), Ok((11, false)));
11312        assert_eq!(&b[..11], b"aaaaabbbccc");
11313    }
11314
11315    #[test]
11316    fn stream_data_overlap_with_reordering() {
11317        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11318
11319        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11320        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11321
11322        let frames = [
11323            frame::Frame::Stream {
11324                stream_id: 0,
11325                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"aaaaa", 0, false),
11326            },
11327            frame::Frame::Stream {
11328                stream_id: 0,
11329                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"ccccc", 6, false),
11330            },
11331            frame::Frame::Stream {
11332                stream_id: 0,
11333                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"bbbbb", 3, false),
11334            },
11335        ];
11336
11337        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11338        assert!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf).is_ok());
11339
11340        let mut b = [0; 15];
11341        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut b), Ok((11, false)));
11342        assert_eq!(&b[..11], b"aaaaabccccc");
11343    }
11344
11345    #[test]
11346    /// Tests that receiving a valid RESET_STREAM frame when all data has
11347    /// already been read, notifies the application.
11348    fn reset_stream_data_recvd() {
11349        let mut b = [0; 15];
11350        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11351
11352        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11353        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11354
11355        // Client sends some data.
11356        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"hello", false), Ok(5));
11357        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
11358
11359        // Server gets data and sends data back, closing stream.
11360        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11361        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(0));
11362        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11363
11364        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut b), Ok((5, false)));
11365        assert!(!pipe.server.stream_finished(0));
11366
11367        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11368        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11369
11370        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(0, b"", true), Ok(0));
11371        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
11372
11373        let mut r = pipe.client.readable();
11374        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(0));
11375        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11376
11377        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_recv(0, &mut b), Ok((0, true)));
11378        assert!(pipe.client.stream_finished(0));
11379
11380        // Client sends RESET_STREAM, closing stream.
11381        let frames = [frame::Frame::ResetStream {
11382            stream_id: 0,
11383            error_code: 42,
11384            final_size: 5,
11385        }];
11386
11387        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11388        assert_eq!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf), Ok(39));
11389
11390        // Server is notified of stream readability, due to reset.
11391        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11392        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(0));
11393        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11394
11395        assert_eq!(
11396            pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut b),
11397            Err(Error::StreamReset(42))
11398        );
11399
11400        assert!(pipe.server.stream_finished(0));
11401
11402        // Sending RESET_STREAM again shouldn't make stream readable again.
11403        pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
11404            .unwrap();
11405
11406        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11407        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11408    }
11409
11410    #[test]
11411    /// Tests that receiving a valid RESET_STREAM frame when all data has _not_
11412    /// been read, discards all buffered data and notifies the application.
11413    fn reset_stream_data_not_recvd() {
11414        let mut b = [0; 15];
11415        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11416
11417        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11418        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11419
11420        // Client sends some data.
11421        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"h", false), Ok(1));
11422        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
11423
11424        // Server gets data and sends data back, closing stream.
11425        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11426        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(0));
11427        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11428
11429        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut b), Ok((1, false)));
11430        assert!(!pipe.server.stream_finished(0));
11431
11432        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11433        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11434
11435        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(0, b"", true), Ok(0));
11436        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
11437
11438        let mut r = pipe.client.readable();
11439        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(0));
11440        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11441
11442        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_recv(0, &mut b), Ok((0, true)));
11443        assert!(pipe.client.stream_finished(0));
11444
11445        // Client sends RESET_STREAM, closing stream.
11446        let frames = [frame::Frame::ResetStream {
11447            stream_id: 0,
11448            error_code: 42,
11449            final_size: 5,
11450        }];
11451
11452        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11453        assert_eq!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf), Ok(39));
11454
11455        // Server is notified of stream readability, due to reset.
11456        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11457        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(0));
11458        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11459
11460        assert_eq!(
11461            pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut b),
11462            Err(Error::StreamReset(42))
11463        );
11464
11465        assert!(pipe.server.stream_finished(0));
11466
11467        // Sending RESET_STREAM again shouldn't make stream readable again.
11468        assert_eq!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf), Ok(39));
11469
11470        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11471        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11472    }
11473
11474    #[test]
11475    /// Tests that RESET_STREAM frames exceeding the connection-level flow
11476    /// control limit cause an error.
11477    fn reset_stream_flow_control() {
11478        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11479
11480        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11481        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11482
11483        let frames = [
11484            frame::Frame::Stream {
11485                stream_id: 0,
11486                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa", 0, false),
11487            },
11488            frame::Frame::Stream {
11489                stream_id: 4,
11490                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", 0, false),
11491            },
11492            frame::Frame::ResetStream {
11493                stream_id: 4,
11494                error_code: 0,
11495                final_size: 15,
11496            },
11497            frame::Frame::Stream {
11498                stream_id: 8,
11499                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", 0, false),
11500            },
11501        ];
11502
11503        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11504        assert_eq!(
11505            pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf),
11506            Err(Error::FlowControl),
11507        );
11508    }
11509
11510    #[test]
11511    /// Tests that RESET_STREAM frames exceeding the stream-level flow control
11512    /// limit cause an error.
11513    fn reset_stream_flow_control_stream() {
11514        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11515
11516        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11517        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11518
11519        let frames = [
11520            frame::Frame::Stream {
11521                stream_id: 4,
11522                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"a", 0, false),
11523            },
11524            frame::Frame::ResetStream {
11525                stream_id: 4,
11526                error_code: 0,
11527                final_size: 16, // Past stream's flow control limit.
11528            },
11529        ];
11530
11531        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11532        assert_eq!(
11533            pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf),
11534            Err(Error::FlowControl),
11535        );
11536    }
11537
11538    #[test]
11539    fn path_challenge() {
11540        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11541
11542        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11543        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11544
11545        let frames = [frame::Frame::PathChallenge { data: [0xba; 8] }];
11546
11547        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11548
11549        let len = pipe
11550            .send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
11551            .unwrap();
11552
11553        assert!(len > 0);
11554
11555        let frames =
11556            testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
11557        let mut iter = frames.iter();
11558
11559        // Ignore ACK.
11560        iter.next().unwrap();
11561
11562        assert_eq!(
11563            iter.next(),
11564            Some(&frame::Frame::PathResponse { data: [0xba; 8] })
11565        );
11566    }
11567
11568    #[cfg(not(feature = "openssl"))] // 0-RTT not supported when using openssl/quictls
11569    #[test]
11570    /// Simulates reception of an early 1-RTT packet on the server, by
11571    /// delaying the client's Handshake packet that completes the handshake.
11572    fn early_1rtt_packet() {
11573        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11574
11575        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11576
11577        // Client sends initial flight
11578        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
11579        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, flight).unwrap();
11580
11581        // Server sends initial flight.
11582        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).unwrap();
11583        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.client, flight).unwrap();
11584
11585        // Client sends Handshake packet.
11586        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
11587
11588        // Emulate handshake packet delay by not making server process client
11589        // packet.
11590        let delayed = flight;
11591
11592        testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).ok();
11593
11594        assert!(pipe.client.is_established());
11595
11596        // Send 1-RTT packet #0.
11597        let frames = [frame::Frame::Stream {
11598            stream_id: 0,
11599            data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"hello, world", 0, true),
11600        }];
11601
11602        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11603        let written =
11604            testing::encode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
11605                .unwrap();
11606
11607        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..written]), Ok(written));
11608
11609        // Send 1-RTT packet #1.
11610        let frames = [frame::Frame::Stream {
11611            stream_id: 4,
11612            data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"hello, world", 0, true),
11613        }];
11614
11615        let written =
11616            testing::encode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
11617                .unwrap();
11618
11619        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..written]), Ok(written));
11620
11621        assert!(!pipe.server.is_established());
11622
11623        // Client sent 1-RTT packets 0 and 1, but server hasn't received them.
11624        //
11625        // Note that `largest_rx_pkt_num` is initialized to 0, so we need to
11626        // send another 1-RTT packet to make this check meaningful.
11627        assert_eq!(
11628            pipe.server.pkt_num_spaces[packet::Epoch::Application]
11629                .largest_rx_pkt_num,
11630            0
11631        );
11632
11633        // Process delayed packet.
11634        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, delayed).unwrap();
11635
11636        assert!(pipe.server.is_established());
11637
11638        assert_eq!(
11639            pipe.server.pkt_num_spaces[packet::Epoch::Application]
11640                .largest_rx_pkt_num,
11641            0
11642        );
11643    }
11644
11645    #[test]
11646    fn stop_sending() {
11647        let mut b = [0; 15];
11648
11649        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11650
11651        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11652        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11653
11654        // Client sends some data, and closes stream.
11655        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"hello", true), Ok(5));
11656        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
11657
11658        // Server gets data.
11659        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11660        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(0));
11661        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11662
11663        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut b), Ok((5, true)));
11664        assert!(pipe.server.stream_finished(0));
11665
11666        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11667        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11668
11669        // Server sends data, until blocked.
11670        let mut r = pipe.server.writable();
11671        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(0));
11672        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11673
11674        while pipe.server.stream_send(0, b"world", false) != Err(Error::Done) {
11675            assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
11676        }
11677
11678        let mut r = pipe.server.writable();
11679        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11680
11681        // Client sends STOP_SENDING.
11682        let frames = [frame::Frame::StopSending {
11683            stream_id: 0,
11684            error_code: 42,
11685        }];
11686
11687        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11688        let len = pipe
11689            .send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
11690            .unwrap();
11691
11692        // Server sent a RESET_STREAM frame in response.
11693        let frames =
11694            testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
11695
11696        let mut iter = frames.iter();
11697
11698        // Skip ACK frame.
11699        iter.next();
11700
11701        assert_eq!(
11702            iter.next(),
11703            Some(&frame::Frame::ResetStream {
11704                stream_id: 0,
11705                error_code: 42,
11706                final_size: 15,
11707            })
11708        );
11709
11710        // Stream is writable, but writing returns an error.
11711        let mut r = pipe.server.writable();
11712        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(0));
11713        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11714
11715        assert_eq!(
11716            pipe.server.stream_send(0, b"world", true),
11717            Err(Error::StreamStopped(42)),
11718        );
11719
11720        assert_eq!(pipe.server.streams.len(), 1);
11721
11722        // Client acks RESET_STREAM frame.
11723        let mut ranges = ranges::RangeSet::default();
11724        ranges.insert(pipe.server.next_pkt_num - 5..pipe.server.next_pkt_num);
11725
11726        let frames = [frame::Frame::ACK {
11727            ack_delay: 15,
11728            ranges,
11729            ecn_counts: None,
11730        }];
11731
11732        assert_eq!(pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf), Ok(0));
11733
11734        // Stream is collected on the server after RESET_STREAM is acked.
11735        assert_eq!(pipe.server.streams.len(), 0);
11736
11737        // Sending STOP_SENDING again shouldn't trigger RESET_STREAM again.
11738        let frames = [frame::Frame::StopSending {
11739            stream_id: 0,
11740            error_code: 42,
11741        }];
11742
11743        let len = pipe
11744            .send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
11745            .unwrap();
11746
11747        let frames =
11748            testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
11749
11750        assert_eq!(frames.len(), 1);
11751
11752        match frames.first() {
11753            Some(frame::Frame::ACK { .. }) => (),
11754
11755            f => panic!("expected ACK frame, got {:?}", f),
11756        };
11757
11758        let mut r = pipe.server.writable();
11759        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11760    }
11761
11762    #[test]
11763    fn stop_sending_fin() {
11764        let mut b = [0; 15];
11765
11766        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11767
11768        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11769        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11770
11771        // Client sends some data, and closes stream.
11772        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"hello", true), Ok(5));
11773        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
11774
11775        // Server gets data.
11776        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11777        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(4));
11778        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11779
11780        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut b), Ok((5, true)));
11781        assert!(pipe.server.stream_finished(4));
11782
11783        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11784        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11785
11786        // Server sends data...
11787        let mut r = pipe.server.writable();
11788        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(4));
11789        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11790
11791        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(4, b"world", false), Ok(5));
11792        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
11793
11794        // ...and buffers more, and closes stream.
11795        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(4, b"world", true), Ok(5));
11796
11797        // Client sends STOP_SENDING before server flushes stream.
11798        let frames = [frame::Frame::StopSending {
11799            stream_id: 4,
11800            error_code: 42,
11801        }];
11802
11803        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11804        let len = pipe
11805            .send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
11806            .unwrap();
11807
11808        // Server sent a RESET_STREAM frame in response.
11809        let frames =
11810            testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
11811
11812        let mut iter = frames.iter();
11813
11814        // Skip ACK frame.
11815        iter.next();
11816
11817        assert_eq!(
11818            iter.next(),
11819            Some(&frame::Frame::ResetStream {
11820                stream_id: 4,
11821                error_code: 42,
11822                final_size: 5,
11823            })
11824        );
11825
11826        // No more frames are sent by the server.
11827        assert_eq!(iter.next(), None);
11828    }
11829
11830    #[test]
11831    /// Tests that resetting a stream restores flow control for unsent data.
11832    fn stop_sending_unsent_tx_cap() {
11833        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11834
11835        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
11836        config
11837            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
11838            .unwrap();
11839        config
11840            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
11841            .unwrap();
11842        config
11843            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
11844            .unwrap();
11845        config.set_initial_max_data(15);
11846        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(30);
11847        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(30);
11848        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(30);
11849        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
11850        config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(0);
11851        config.verify_peer(false);
11852
11853        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
11854        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11855
11856        // Client sends some data.
11857        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"hello", true), Ok(5));
11858        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
11859
11860        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
11861        assert_eq!(r.next(), Some(4));
11862        assert_eq!(r.next(), None);
11863
11864        let mut b = [0; 15];
11865        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut b), Ok((5, true)));
11866
11867        // Server sends some data.
11868        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(4, b"hello", false), Ok(5));
11869        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
11870
11871        // Server buffers some data, until send capacity limit reached.
11872        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(4, b"hello", false), Ok(5));
11873        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(4, b"hello", false), Ok(5));
11874        assert_eq!(
11875            pipe.server.stream_send(4, b"hello", false),
11876            Err(Error::Done)
11877        );
11878
11879        // Client sends STOP_SENDING.
11880        let frames = [frame::Frame::StopSending {
11881            stream_id: 4,
11882            error_code: 42,
11883        }];
11884
11885        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
11886        pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
11887            .unwrap();
11888
11889        // Server can now send more data (on a different stream).
11890        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(8, b"hello", true), Ok(5));
11891        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
11892
11893        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(8, b"hello", false), Ok(5));
11894        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(8, b"hello", false), Ok(5));
11895        assert_eq!(
11896            pipe.server.stream_send(8, b"hello", false),
11897            Err(Error::Done)
11898        );
11899        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
11900    }
11901
11902    #[test]
11903    fn stream_shutdown_read() {
11904        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
11905
11906        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
11907        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
11908
11909        // Client sends some data.
11910        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"hello, world", false), Ok(12));
11911        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
11912
11913        let mut r = pipe.server.readable();
