14030            .unwrap();
14031        config.set_initial_max_data(50000);
14032        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(50000);
14033        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(50000);
14034        config.set_max_recv_udp_payload_size(1406);
14035        config.verify_peer(false);
14036
14037        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_client_config(&mut config).unwrap();
14038        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
14039
14040        // Client sends stream data.
14041        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"a", true), Ok(1));
14042        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14043
14044        // Server reads stream data.
14045        let mut b = [0; 15];
14046        pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut b).unwrap();
14047        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14048
14049        // Server sends stream data bigger than cwnd.
14050        let send_buf1 = [0; 20000];
14051        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(0, &send_buf1, false), Ok(12000));
14052
14053        testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).ok();
14054
14055        // We can't create a new frame because there is no room by cwnd.
14056        // app_limited should be false because we can't send more by cwnd.
14057        assert!(!pipe
14058            .server
14059            .paths
14060            .get_active()
14061            .expect("no active")
14062            .recovery
14063            .app_limited());
14064    }
14065
14066    #[test]
14067    fn app_limited_not_changed_on_no_new_frames() {
14068        let mut config = Config::new(PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
14069        config
14070            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
14071            .unwrap();
14072        config.set_initial_max_data(50000);
14073        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(50000);
14074        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(50000);
14075        config.set_max_recv_udp_payload_size(1200);
14076        config.verify_peer(false);
14077
14078        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_client_config(&mut config).unwrap();
14079        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
14080
14081        // Client sends stream data.
14082        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"a", true), Ok(1));
14083        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14084
14085        // Server reads stream data.
14086        let mut b = [0; 15];
14087        pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut b).unwrap();
14088        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14089
14090        // Client's app_limited is true because its bytes-in-flight
14091        // is much smaller than the current cwnd.
14092        assert!(pipe
14093            .client
14094            .paths
14095            .get_active()
14096            .expect("no active")
14097            .recovery
14098            .app_limited());
14099
14100        // Client has no new frames to send - returns Done.
14101        assert_eq!(testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client), Err(Error::Done));
14102
14103        // Client's app_limited should remain the same.
14104        assert!(pipe
14105            .client
14106            .paths
14107            .get_active()
14108            .expect("no active")
14109            .recovery
14110            .app_limited());
14111    }
14112
14113    #[test]
14114    fn limit_ack_ranges() {
14115        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
14116
14117        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
14118        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
14119
14120        let epoch = packet::Epoch::Application;
14121
14122        assert_eq!(pipe.server.pkt_num_spaces[epoch].recv_pkt_need_ack.len(), 0);
14123
14124        let frames = [
14125            frame::Frame::Ping { mtu_probe: None },
14126            frame::Frame::Padding { len: 3 },
14127        ];
14128
14129        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
14130
14131        let mut last_packet_sent = 0;
14132
14133        for _ in 0..512 {
14134            let recv_count = pipe.server.recv_count;
14135
14136            last_packet_sent = pipe.client.next_pkt_num;
14137
14138            pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
14139                .unwrap();
14140
14141            assert_eq!(pipe.server.recv_count, recv_count + 1);
14142
14143            // Skip packet number.
14144            pipe.client.next_pkt_num += 1;
14145        }
14146
14147        assert_eq!(
14148            pipe.server.pkt_num_spaces[epoch].recv_pkt_need_ack.len(),
14149            MAX_ACK_RANGES
14150        );
14151
14152        assert_eq!(
14153            pipe.server.pkt_num_spaces[epoch].recv_pkt_need_ack.first(),
14154            Some(last_packet_sent - ((MAX_ACK_RANGES as u64) - 1) * 2)
14155        );
14156
14157        assert_eq!(
14158            pipe.server.pkt_num_spaces[epoch].recv_pkt_need_ack.last(),
14159            Some(last_packet_sent)
14160        );
14161    }
14162
14163    #[test]
14164    /// Tests that streams are correctly scheduled based on their priority.
14165    fn stream_priority() {
14166        // Limit 1-RTT packet size to avoid congestion control interference.
14167        const MAX_TEST_PACKET_SIZE: usize = 540;
14168
14169        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
14170
14171        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
14172        config
14173            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
14174            .unwrap();
14175        config
14176            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
14177            .unwrap();
14178        config
14179            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
14180            .unwrap();
14181        config.set_initial_max_data(1_000_000);
14182        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(1_000_000);
14183        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(1_000_000);
14184        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(0);
14185        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(100);
14186        config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(0);
14187        config.verify_peer(false);
14188
14189        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
14190        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
14191
14192        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"a", false), Ok(1));
14193        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14194
14195        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"a", false), Ok(1));
14196        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14197
14198        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(8, b"a", false), Ok(1));
14199        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14200
14201        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(12, b"a", false), Ok(1));
14202        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14203
14204        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(16, b"a", false), Ok(1));
14205        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14206
14207        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(20, b"a", false), Ok(1));
14208        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14209
14210        let mut b = [0; 1];
14211
14212        let out = [b'b'; 500];
14213
14214        // Server prioritizes streams as follows:
14215        //  * Stream 8 and 16 have the same priority but are non-incremental.
14216        //  * Stream 4, 12 and 20 have the same priority but 20 is non-incremental
14217        //    and 4 and 12 are incremental.
14218        //  * Stream 0 is on its own.
14219
14220        pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut b).unwrap();
14221        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_priority(0, 255, true), Ok(()));
14222        pipe.server.stream_send(0, &out, false).unwrap();
14223        pipe.server.stream_send(0, &out, false).unwrap();
14224        pipe.server.stream_send(0, &out, false).unwrap();
14225
14226        pipe.server.stream_recv(12, &mut b).unwrap();
14227        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_priority(12, 42, true), Ok(()));
14228        pipe.server.stream_send(12, &out, false).unwrap();
14229        pipe.server.stream_send(12, &out, false).unwrap();
14230        pipe.server.stream_send(12, &out, false).unwrap();
14231
14232        pipe.server.stream_recv(16, &mut b).unwrap();
14233        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_priority(16, 10, false), Ok(()));
14234        pipe.server.stream_send(16, &out, false).unwrap();
14235        pipe.server.stream_send(16, &out, false).unwrap();
14236        pipe.server.stream_send(16, &out, false).unwrap();
14237
14238        pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut b).unwrap();
14239        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_priority(4, 42, true), Ok(()));
14240        pipe.server.stream_send(4, &out, false).unwrap();
14241        pipe.server.stream_send(4, &out, false).unwrap();
14242        pipe.server.stream_send(4, &out, false).unwrap();
14243
14244        pipe.server.stream_recv(8, &mut b).unwrap();
14245        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_priority(8, 10, false), Ok(()));
14246        pipe.server.stream_send(8, &out, false).unwrap();
14247        pipe.server.stream_send(8, &out, false).unwrap();
14248        pipe.server.stream_send(8, &out, false).unwrap();
14249
14250        pipe.server.stream_recv(20, &mut b).unwrap();
14251        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_priority(20, 42, false), Ok(()));
14252        pipe.server.stream_send(20, &out, false).unwrap();
14253        pipe.server.stream_send(20, &out, false).unwrap();
14254        pipe.server.stream_send(20, &out, false).unwrap();
14255
14256        // First is stream 8.
14257        let mut off = 0;
14258
14259        for _ in 1..=3 {
14260            let (len, _) =
14261                pipe.server.send(&mut buf[..MAX_TEST_PACKET_SIZE]).unwrap();
14262
14263            let frames =
14264                testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14265            let stream = frames.first().unwrap();
14266
14267            assert_eq!(stream, &frame::Frame::Stream {
14268                stream_id: 8,
14269                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(&out, off, false),
14270            });
14271
14272            off = match stream {
14273                frame::Frame::Stream { data, .. } => data.max_off(),
14274
14275                _ => unreachable!(),
14276            };
14277        }
14278
14279        // Then is stream 16.
14280        let mut off = 0;
14281
14282        for _ in 1..=3 {
14283            let (len, _) =
14284                pipe.server.send(&mut buf[..MAX_TEST_PACKET_SIZE]).unwrap();
14285
14286            let frames =
14287                testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14288            let stream = frames.first().unwrap();
14289
14290            assert_eq!(stream, &frame::Frame::Stream {
14291                stream_id: 16,
14292                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(&out, off, false),
14293            });
14294
14295            off = match stream {
14296                frame::Frame::Stream { data, .. } => data.max_off(),
14297
14298                _ => unreachable!(),
14299            };
14300        }
14301
14302        // Then is stream 20.
14303        let mut off = 0;
14304
14305        for _ in 1..=3 {
14306            let (len, _) =
14307                pipe.server.send(&mut buf[..MAX_TEST_PACKET_SIZE]).unwrap();
14308
14309            let frames =
14310                testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14311            let stream = frames.first().unwrap();
14312
14313            assert_eq!(stream, &frame::Frame::Stream {
14314                stream_id: 20,
14315                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(&out, off, false),
14316            });
14317
14318            off = match stream {
14319                frame::Frame::Stream { data, .. } => data.max_off(),
14320
14321                _ => unreachable!(),
14322            };
14323        }
14324
14325        // Then are stream 12 and 4, with the same priority, incrementally.
14326        let mut off = 0;
14327
14328        for _ in 1..=3 {
14329            let (len, _) =
14330                pipe.server.send(&mut buf[..MAX_TEST_PACKET_SIZE]).unwrap();
14331
14332            let frames =
14333                testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14334
14335            assert_eq!(
14336                frames.first(),
14337                Some(&frame::Frame::Stream {
14338                    stream_id: 12,
14339                    data: stream::RangeBuf::from(&out, off, false),
14340                })
14341            );
14342
14343            let (len, _) =
14344                pipe.server.send(&mut buf[..MAX_TEST_PACKET_SIZE]).unwrap();
14345
14346            let frames =
14347                testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14348
14349            let stream = frames.first().unwrap();
14350
14351            assert_eq!(stream, &frame::Frame::Stream {
14352                stream_id: 4,
14353                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(&out, off, false),
14354            });
14355
14356            off = match stream {
14357                frame::Frame::Stream { data, .. } => data.max_off(),
14358
14359                _ => unreachable!(),
14360            };
14361        }
14362
14363        // Final is stream 0.
14364        let mut off = 0;
14365
14366        for _ in 1..=3 {
14367            let (len, _) =
14368                pipe.server.send(&mut buf[..MAX_TEST_PACKET_SIZE]).unwrap();
14369
14370            let frames =
14371                testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14372            let stream = frames.first().unwrap();
14373
14374            assert_eq!(stream, &frame::Frame::Stream {
14375                stream_id: 0,
14376                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(&out, off, false),
14377            });
14378
14379            off = match stream {
14380                frame::Frame::Stream { data, .. } => data.max_off(),
14381
14382                _ => unreachable!(),
14383            };
14384        }
14385
14386        assert_eq!(pipe.server.send(&mut buf), Err(Error::Done));
14387    }
14388
14389    #[test]
14390    /// Tests that changing a stream's priority is correctly propagated.
14391    fn stream_reprioritize() {
14392        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
14393
14394        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
14395        config
14396            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
14397            .unwrap();
14398        config
14399            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
14400            .unwrap();
14401        config
14402            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
14403            .unwrap();
14404        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
14405        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
14406        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
14407        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(0);
14408        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(5);
14409        config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(0);
14410        config.verify_peer(false);
14411
14412        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
14413        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
14414
14415        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"a", false), Ok(1));
14416        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14417
14418        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"a", false), Ok(1));
14419        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14420
14421        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(8, b"a", false), Ok(1));
14422        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14423
14424        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(12, b"a", false), Ok(1));
14425        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14426
14427        let mut b = [0; 1];
14428
14429        pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut b).unwrap();
14430        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_priority(0, 255, true), Ok(()));
14431        pipe.server.stream_send(0, b"b", false).unwrap();
14432
14433        pipe.server.stream_recv(12, &mut b).unwrap();
14434        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_priority(12, 42, true), Ok(()));
14435        pipe.server.stream_send(12, b"b", false).unwrap();
14436
14437        pipe.server.stream_recv(8, &mut b).unwrap();
14438        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_priority(8, 10, true), Ok(()));
14439        pipe.server.stream_send(8, b"b", false).unwrap();
14440
14441        pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut b).unwrap();
14442        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_priority(4, 42, true), Ok(()));
14443        pipe.server.stream_send(4, b"b", false).unwrap();
14444
14445        // Stream 0 is re-prioritized!!!
14446        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_priority(0, 20, true), Ok(()));
14447
14448        // First is stream 8.
14449        let (len, _) = pipe.server.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14450
14451        let frames =
14452            testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14453
14454        assert_eq!(
14455            frames.first(),
14456            Some(&frame::Frame::Stream {
14457                stream_id: 8,
14458                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"b", 0, false),
14459            })
14460        );
14461
14462        // Then is stream 0.
14463        let (len, _) = pipe.server.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14464
14465        let frames =
14466            testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14467
14468        assert_eq!(
14469            frames.first(),
14470            Some(&frame::Frame::Stream {
14471                stream_id: 0,
14472                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"b", 0, false),
14473            })
14474        );
14475
14476        // Then are stream 12 and 4, with the same priority.
14477        let (len, _) = pipe.server.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14478
14479        let frames =
14480            testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14481
14482        assert_eq!(
14483            frames.first(),
14484            Some(&frame::Frame::Stream {
14485                stream_id: 12,
14486                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"b", 0, false),
14487            })
14488        );
14489
14490        let (len, _) = pipe.server.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14491
14492        let frames =
14493            testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14494
14495        assert_eq!(
14496            frames.first(),
14497            Some(&frame::Frame::Stream {
14498                stream_id: 4,
14499                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"b", 0, false),
14500            })
14501        );
14502
14503        assert_eq!(pipe.server.send(&mut buf), Err(Error::Done));
14504    }
14505
14506    #[test]
14507    /// Tests that streams and datagrams are correctly scheduled.
14508    fn stream_datagram_priority() {
14509        // Limit 1-RTT packet size to avoid congestion control interference.
14510        const MAX_TEST_PACKET_SIZE: usize = 540;
14511
14512        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
14513
14514        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
14515        config
14516            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
14517            .unwrap();
14518        config
14519            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
14520            .unwrap();
14521        config
14522            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
14523            .unwrap();
14524        config.set_initial_max_data(1_000_000);
14525        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(1_000_000);
14526        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(1_000_000);
14527        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(0);
14528        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(100);
14529        config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(0);
14530        config.enable_dgram(true, 10, 10);
14531        config.verify_peer(false);
14532
14533        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
14534        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
14535
14536        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"a", false), Ok(1));
14537        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14538
14539        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"a", false), Ok(1));
14540        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14541
14542        let mut b = [0; 1];
14543
14544        let out = [b'b'; 500];
14545
14546        // Server prioritizes Stream 0 and 4 with the same urgency with
14547        // incremental, meaning the frames should be sent in round-robin
14548        // fashion. It also sends DATAGRAMS which are always interleaved with
14549        // STREAM frames. So we'll expect a mix of frame types regardless
14550        // of the order that the application writes things in.
14551
14552        pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut b).unwrap();
14553        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_priority(0, 255, true), Ok(()));
14554        pipe.server.stream_send(0, &out, false).unwrap();
14555        pipe.server.stream_send(0, &out, false).unwrap();
14556        pipe.server.stream_send(0, &out, false).unwrap();
14557
14558        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_priority(4, 255, true), Ok(()));
14559        pipe.server.stream_send(4, &out, false).unwrap();
14560        pipe.server.stream_send(4, &out, false).unwrap();
14561        pipe.server.stream_send(4, &out, false).unwrap();
14562
14563        for _ in 1..=6 {
14564            assert_eq!(pipe.server.dgram_send(&out), Ok(()));
14565        }
14566
14567        let mut off_0 = 0;
14568        let mut off_4 = 0;
14569
14570        for _ in 1..=3 {
14571            // DATAGRAM
14572            let (len, _) =
14573                pipe.server.send(&mut buf[..MAX_TEST_PACKET_SIZE]).unwrap();
14574
14575            let frames =
14576                testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14577            let mut frame_iter = frames.iter();
14578
14579            assert_eq!(frame_iter.next().unwrap(), &frame::Frame::Datagram {
14580                data: out.into()
14581            });
14582            assert_eq!(frame_iter.next(), None);
14583
14584            // STREAM 0
14585            let (len, _) =
14586                pipe.server.send(&mut buf[..MAX_TEST_PACKET_SIZE]).unwrap();
14587
14588            let frames =
14589                testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14590            let mut frame_iter = frames.iter();
14591            let stream = frame_iter.next().unwrap();
14592
14593            assert_eq!(stream, &frame::Frame::Stream {
14594                stream_id: 0,
14595                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(&out, off_0, false),
14596            });
14597
14598            off_0 = match stream {
14599                frame::Frame::Stream { data, .. } => data.max_off(),
14600
14601                _ => unreachable!(),
14602            };
14603            assert_eq!(frame_iter.next(), None);
14604
14605            // DATAGRAM
14606            let (len, _) =
14607                pipe.server.send(&mut buf[..MAX_TEST_PACKET_SIZE]).unwrap();
14608
14609            let frames =
14610                testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14611            let mut frame_iter = frames.iter();
14612
14613            assert_eq!(frame_iter.next().unwrap(), &frame::Frame::Datagram {
14614                data: out.into()
14615            });
14616            assert_eq!(frame_iter.next(), None);
14617
14618            // STREAM 4
14619            let (len, _) =
14620                pipe.server.send(&mut buf[..MAX_TEST_PACKET_SIZE]).unwrap();
14621
14622            let frames =
14623                testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.client, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14624            let mut frame_iter = frames.iter();
14625            let stream = frame_iter.next().unwrap();
14626
14627            assert_eq!(stream, &frame::Frame::Stream {
14628                stream_id: 4,
14629                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(&out, off_4, false),
14630            });
14631
14632            off_4 = match stream {
14633                frame::Frame::Stream { data, .. } => data.max_off(),
14634
14635                _ => unreachable!(),
14636            };
14637            assert_eq!(frame_iter.next(), None);
14638        }
14639    }
14640
14641    #[test]
14642    /// Tests that old data is retransmitted on PTO.
14643    fn early_retransmit() {
14644        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
14645
14646        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
14647        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
14648
14649        // Client sends stream data.
14650        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"a", false), Ok(1));
14651        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
14652
14653        // Client sends more stream data, but packet is lost
14654        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"b", false), Ok(1));
14655        assert!(pipe.client.send(&mut buf).is_ok());
14656
14657        // Wait until PTO expires. Since the RTT is very low, wait a bit more.
14658        let timer = pipe.client.timeout().unwrap();
14659        std::thread::sleep(timer + time::Duration::from_millis(1));
14660
14661        pipe.client.on_timeout();
14662
14663        let epoch = packet::Epoch::Application;
14664        assert_eq!(
14665            pipe.client
14666                .paths
14667                .get_active()
14668                .expect("no active")
14669                .recovery
14670                .loss_probes(epoch),
14671            1,
14672        );
14673
14674        // Client retransmits stream data in PTO probe.
14675        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14676        assert_eq!(
14677            pipe.client
14678                .paths
14679                .get_active()
14680                .expect("no active")
14681                .recovery
14682                .loss_probes(epoch),
14683            0,
14684        );
14685
14686        let frames =
14687            testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.server, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
14688
14689        let mut iter = frames.iter();
14690
14691        // Skip ACK frame.
14692        iter.next();
14693
14694        assert_eq!(
14695            iter.next(),
14696            Some(&frame::Frame::Stream {
14697                stream_id: 4,
14698                data: stream::RangeBuf::from(b"b", 0, false),
14699            })
14700        );
14701        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stats().retrans, 1);
14702    }
14703
14704    #[test]
14705    /// Tests that PTO probe packets are not coalesced together.
14706    fn dont_coalesce_probes() {
14707        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
14708
14709        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
14710
14711        // Client sends Initial packet.
14712        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14713        assert_eq!(len, 1200);
14714
14715        // Wait for PTO to expire.
14716        let timer = pipe.client.timeout().unwrap();
14717        std::thread::sleep(timer + time::Duration::from_millis(1));
14718
14719        pipe.client.on_timeout();
14720
14721        let epoch = packet::Epoch::Initial;
14722        assert_eq!(
14723            pipe.client
14724                .paths
14725                .get_active()
14726                .expect("no active")
14727                .recovery
14728                .loss_probes(epoch),
14729            1,
14730        );
14731
14732        // Client sends PTO probe.
14733        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14734        assert_eq!(len, 1200);
14735        assert_eq!(
14736            pipe.client
14737                .paths
14738                .get_active()
14739                .expect("no active")
14740                .recovery
14741                .loss_probes(epoch),
14742            0,
14743        );
14744
14745        // Wait for PTO to expire.
14746        let timer = pipe.client.timeout().unwrap();
14747        std::thread::sleep(timer + time::Duration::from_millis(1));
14748
14749        pipe.client.on_timeout();
14750
14751        assert_eq!(
14752            pipe.client
14753                .paths
14754                .get_active()
14755                .expect("no active")
14756                .recovery
14757                .loss_probes(epoch),
14758            2,
14759        );
14760
14761        // Client sends first PTO probe.
14762        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14763        assert_eq!(len, 1200);
14764        assert_eq!(
14765            pipe.client
14766                .paths
14767                .get_active()
14768                .expect("no active")
14769                .recovery
14770                .loss_probes(epoch),
14771            1,
14772        );
14773
14774        // Client sends second PTO probe.
14775        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14776        assert_eq!(len, 1200);
14777        assert_eq!(
14778            pipe.client
14779                .paths
14780                .get_active()
14781                .expect("no active")
14782                .recovery
14783                .loss_probes(epoch),
14784            0,
14785        );
14786    }
14787
14788    #[test]
14789    fn coalesce_padding_short() {
14790        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
14791
14792        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
14793
14794        // Client sends first flight.
14795        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14796        assert_eq!(len, MIN_CLIENT_INITIAL_LEN);
14797        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..len]), Ok(len));
14798
14799        // Server sends first flight.
14800        let (len, _) = pipe.server.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14801        assert_eq!(len, MIN_CLIENT_INITIAL_LEN);
14802        assert_eq!(pipe.client_recv(&mut buf[..len]), Ok(len));
14803
14804        let (len, _) = pipe.server.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14805        assert_eq!(pipe.client_recv(&mut buf[..len]), Ok(len));
14806
14807        // Client sends stream data.
14808        assert!(pipe.client.is_established());
14809        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"hello", true), Ok(5));
14810
14811        // Client sends second flight.
14812        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14813        assert_eq!(len, MIN_CLIENT_INITIAL_LEN);
14814        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..len]), Ok(len));
14815
14816        // None of the sent packets should have been dropped.
14817        assert_eq!(pipe.client.sent_count, pipe.server.recv_count);
14818        assert_eq!(pipe.server.sent_count, pipe.client.recv_count);
14819    }
14820
14821    #[test]
14822    /// Tests that client avoids handshake deadlock by arming PTO.
14823    fn handshake_anti_deadlock() {
14824        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
14825
14826        let mut config = Config::new(PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
14827        config
14828            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert-big.crt")
14829            .unwrap();
14830        config
14831            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
14832            .unwrap();
14833        config
14834            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
14835            .unwrap();
14836
14837        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_server_config(&mut config).unwrap();
14838
14839        assert!(!pipe.client.handshake_status().has_handshake_keys);
14840        assert!(!pipe.client.handshake_status().peer_verified_address);
14841        assert!(!pipe.server.handshake_status().has_handshake_keys);
14842        assert!(pipe.server.handshake_status().peer_verified_address);
14843
14844        // Client sends padded Initial.
14845        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14846        assert_eq!(len, 1200);
14847
14848        // Server receives client's Initial and sends own Initial and Handshake
14849        // until it's blocked by the anti-amplification limit.
14850        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..len]), Ok(len));
14851        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).unwrap();
14852
14853        assert!(!pipe.client.handshake_status().has_handshake_keys);
14854        assert!(!pipe.client.handshake_status().peer_verified_address);
14855        assert!(pipe.server.handshake_status().has_handshake_keys);
14856        assert!(pipe.server.handshake_status().peer_verified_address);
14857
14858        // Client receives the server flight and sends Handshake ACK, but it is
14859        // lost.
14860        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.client, flight).unwrap();
14861        testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
14862
14863        assert!(pipe.client.handshake_status().has_handshake_keys);
14864        assert!(!pipe.client.handshake_status().peer_verified_address);
14865        assert!(pipe.server.handshake_status().has_handshake_keys);
14866        assert!(pipe.server.handshake_status().peer_verified_address);
14867
14868        // Make sure client's PTO timer is armed.
14869        assert!(pipe.client.timeout().is_some());
14870    }
14871
14872    #[test]
14873    /// Tests that packets with corrupted type (from Handshake to Initial) are
14874    /// properly ignored.
14875    fn handshake_packet_type_corruption() {
14876        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
14877
14878        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
14879
14880        // Client sends padded Initial.
14881        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14882        assert_eq!(len, 1200);
14883
14884        // Server receives client's Initial and sends own Initial and Handshake.
14885        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..len]), Ok(len));
14886
14887        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).unwrap();
14888        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.client, flight).unwrap();
14889
14890        // Client sends Initial packet with ACK.
14891        let active_pid =
14892            pipe.client.paths.get_active_path_id().expect("no active");
14893        let (ty, len) = pipe
14894            .client
14895            .send_single(&mut buf, active_pid, false, time::Instant::now())
14896            .unwrap();
14897        assert_eq!(ty, Type::Initial);
14898
14899        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..len]), Ok(len));
14900
14901        // Client sends Handshake packet.
14902        let (ty, len) = pipe
14903            .client
14904            .send_single(&mut buf, active_pid, false, time::Instant::now())
14905            .unwrap();
14906        assert_eq!(ty, Type::Handshake);
14907
14908        // Packet type is corrupted to Initial.
14909        buf[0] &= !(0x20);
14910
14911        let hdr = Header::from_slice(&mut buf[..len], 0).unwrap();
14912        assert_eq!(hdr.ty, Type::Initial);
14913
14914        // Server receives corrupted packet without returning an error.
14915        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..len]), Ok(len));
14916    }
14917
14918    #[test]
14919    fn dgram_send_fails_invalidstate() {
14920        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
14921        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
14922
14923        assert_eq!(
14924            pipe.client.dgram_send(b"hello, world"),
14925            Err(Error::InvalidState)
14926        );
14927    }
14928
14929    #[test]
14930    fn dgram_send_app_limited() {
14931        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
14932        let send_buf = [0xcf; 1000];
14933
14934        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
14935        config
14936            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
14937            .unwrap();
14938        config
14939            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
14940            .unwrap();
14941        config
14942            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
14943            .unwrap();
14944        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
14945        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
14946        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
14947        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(10);
14948        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
14949        config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(3);
14950        config.enable_dgram(true, 1000, 1000);
14951        config.set_max_recv_udp_payload_size(1200);
14952        config.verify_peer(false);
14953
14954        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
14955        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
14956
14957        for _ in 0..1000 {
14958            assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send(&send_buf), Ok(()));
14959        }
14960
14961        assert!(!pipe
14962            .client
14963            .paths
14964            .get_active()
14965            .expect("no active")
14966            .recovery
14967            .app_limited());
14968        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send_queue.byte_size(), 1_000_000);
14969
14970        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
14971
14972        assert_ne!(pipe.client.dgram_send_queue.byte_size(), 0);
14973        assert_ne!(pipe.client.dgram_send_queue.byte_size(), 1_000_000);
14974        assert!(!pipe
14975            .client
14976            .paths
14977            .get_active()
14978            .expect("no active")
14979            .recovery
14980            .app_limited());
14981
14982        assert_eq!(pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..len]), Ok(len));
14983
14984        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
14985        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, flight).unwrap();
14986
14987        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).unwrap();
14988        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.client, flight).unwrap();
14989
14990        assert_ne!(pipe.client.dgram_send_queue.byte_size(), 0);
14991        assert_ne!(pipe.client.dgram_send_queue.byte_size(), 1_000_000);
14992
14993        assert!(!pipe
14994            .client
14995            .paths
14996            .get_active()
14997            .expect("no active")
14998            .recovery
14999            .app_limited());
15000    }
15001
15002    #[test]
15003    fn dgram_single_datagram() {
15004        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
15005
15006        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
15007        config
15008            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
15009            .unwrap();
15010        config
15011            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
15012            .unwrap();
15013        config
15014            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
15015            .unwrap();
15016        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
15017        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
15018        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
15019        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(10);
15020        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
15021        config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(3);
15022        config.enable_dgram(true, 10, 10);
15023        config.verify_peer(false);
15024
15025        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
15026        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15027
15028        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send(b"hello, world"), Ok(()));
15029
15030        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15031
15032        let result1 = pipe.server.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15033        assert_eq!(result1, Ok(12));
15034
15035        let result2 = pipe.server.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15036        assert_eq!(result2, Err(Error::Done));
15037    }
15038
15039    #[test]
15040    fn dgram_multiple_datagrams() {
15041        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
15042
15043        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
15044        config
15045            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
15046            .unwrap();
15047        config
15048            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
15049            .unwrap();
15050        config
15051            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
15052            .unwrap();
15053        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
15054        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
15055        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
15056        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(10);
15057        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
15058        config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(3);
15059        config.enable_dgram(true, 2, 3);
15060        config.verify_peer(false);
15061
15062        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
15063        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15064
15065        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send_queue_len(), 0);
15066        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send_queue_byte_size(), 0);
15067
15068        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send(b"hello, world"), Ok(()));
15069        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send(b"ciao, mondo"), Ok(()));
15070        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send(b"hola, mundo"), Ok(()));
15071        assert!(pipe.client.is_dgram_send_queue_full());
15072
15073        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send_queue_byte_size(), 34);
15074
15075        pipe.client
15076            .dgram_purge_outgoing(|d: &[u8]| -> bool { d[0] == b'c' });
15077
15078        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send_queue_len(), 2);
15079        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send_queue_byte_size(), 23);
15080        assert!(!pipe.client.is_dgram_send_queue_full());
15081
15082        // Before packets exchanged, no dgrams on server receive side.
15083        assert_eq!(pipe.server.dgram_recv_queue_len(), 0);
15084
15085        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15086
15087        // After packets exchanged, no dgrams on client send side.
15088        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send_queue_len(), 0);
15089        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send_queue_byte_size(), 0);
15090
15091        assert_eq!(pipe.server.dgram_recv_queue_len(), 2);
15092        assert_eq!(pipe.server.dgram_recv_queue_byte_size(), 23);
15093        assert!(pipe.server.is_dgram_recv_queue_full());
15094
15095        let result1 = pipe.server.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15096        assert_eq!(result1, Ok(12));
15097        assert_eq!(buf[0], b'h');
15098        assert_eq!(buf[1], b'e');
15099        assert!(!pipe.server.is_dgram_recv_queue_full());
15100
15101        let result2 = pipe.server.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15102        assert_eq!(result2, Ok(11));
15103        assert_eq!(buf[0], b'h');
15104        assert_eq!(buf[1], b'o');
15105
15106        let result3 = pipe.server.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15107        assert_eq!(result3, Err(Error::Done));
15108
15109        assert_eq!(pipe.server.dgram_recv_queue_len(), 0);
15110        assert_eq!(pipe.server.dgram_recv_queue_byte_size(), 0);
15111    }
15112
15113    #[test]
15114    fn dgram_send_queue_overflow() {
15115        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
15116
15117        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
15118        config
15119            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
15120            .unwrap();
15121        config
15122            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
15123            .unwrap();
15124        config
15125            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
15126            .unwrap();
15127        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
15128        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
15129        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
15130        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(10);
15131        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
15132        config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(3);
15133        config.enable_dgram(true, 10, 2);
15134        config.verify_peer(false);
15135
15136        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
15137        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15138
15139        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send(b"hello, world"), Ok(()));
15140        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send(b"ciao, mondo"), Ok(()));
15141        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send(b"hola, mundo"), Err(Error::Done));
15142
15143        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15144
15145        let result1 = pipe.server.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15146        assert_eq!(result1, Ok(12));
15147        assert_eq!(buf[0], b'h');
15148        assert_eq!(buf[1], b'e');
15149
15150        let result2 = pipe.server.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15151        assert_eq!(result2, Ok(11));
15152        assert_eq!(buf[0], b'c');
15153        assert_eq!(buf[1], b'i');
15154
15155        let result3 = pipe.server.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15156        assert_eq!(result3, Err(Error::Done));
15157    }
15158
15159    #[test]
15160    fn dgram_recv_queue_overflow() {
15161        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
15162
15163        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
15164        config
15165            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
15166            .unwrap();
15167        config
15168            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
15169            .unwrap();
15170        config
15171            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
15172            .unwrap();
15173        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
15174        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
15175        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
15176        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(10);
15177        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
15178        config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(3);
15179        config.enable_dgram(true, 2, 10);
15180        config.set_max_recv_udp_payload_size(1200);
15181        config.verify_peer(false);
15182
15183        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
15184        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15185
15186        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send(b"hello, world"), Ok(()));
15187        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send(b"ciao, mondo"), Ok(()));
15188        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send(b"hola, mundo"), Ok(()));
15189
15190        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15191
15192        let result1 = pipe.server.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15193        assert_eq!(result1, Ok(11));
15194        assert_eq!(buf[0], b'c');
15195        assert_eq!(buf[1], b'i');
15196
15197        let result2 = pipe.server.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15198        assert_eq!(result2, Ok(11));
15199        assert_eq!(buf[0], b'h');
15200        assert_eq!(buf[1], b'o');
15201
15202        let result3 = pipe.server.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15203        assert_eq!(result3, Err(Error::Done));
15204    }
15205
15206    #[test]
15207    fn dgram_send_max_size() {
15208        let mut buf = [0; MAX_DGRAM_FRAME_SIZE as usize];
15209
15210        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
15211        config
15212            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
15213            .unwrap();
15214        config
15215            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
15216            .unwrap();
15217        config
15218            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
15219            .unwrap();
15220        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
15221        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
15222        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
15223        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(10);
15224        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
15225        config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(3);
15226        config.enable_dgram(true, 10, 10);
15227        config.set_max_recv_udp_payload_size(1452);
15228        config.verify_peer(false);
15229
15230        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
15231
15232        // Before handshake (before peer settings) we don't know max dgram size
15233        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_max_writable_len(), None);
15234
15235        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15236
15237        let max_dgram_size = pipe.client.dgram_max_writable_len().unwrap();
15238
15239        // Tests use a 16-byte connection ID, so the max datagram frame payload
15240        // size is (1200 byte-long packet - 40 bytes overhead)
15241        assert_eq!(max_dgram_size, 1160);
15242
15243        let dgram_packet: Vec<u8> = vec![42; max_dgram_size];
15244
15245        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send(&dgram_packet), Ok(()));
15246
15247        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15248
15249        let result1 = pipe.server.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15250        assert_eq!(result1, Ok(max_dgram_size));
15251
15252        let result2 = pipe.server.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15253        assert_eq!(result2, Err(Error::Done));
15254    }
15255
15256    #[test]
15257    /// Tests is_readable check.
15258    fn is_readable() {
15259        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
15260
15261        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
15262        config
15263            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
15264            .unwrap();
15265        config
15266            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
15267            .unwrap();
15268        config
15269            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
15270            .unwrap();
15271        config.set_initial_max_data(30);
15272        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
15273        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
15274        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(10);
15275        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
15276        config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(3);
15277        config.enable_dgram(true, 10, 10);
15278        config.set_max_recv_udp_payload_size(1452);
15279        config.verify_peer(false);
15280
15281        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
15282        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15283
15284        // No readable data.
15285        assert!(!pipe.client.is_readable());
15286        assert!(!pipe.server.is_readable());
15287
15288        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"aaaaa", false), Ok(5));
15289        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15290
15291        // Server received stream.
15292        assert!(!pipe.client.is_readable());
15293        assert!(pipe.server.is_readable());
15294
15295        assert_eq!(
15296            pipe.server.stream_send(4, b"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa", false),
15297            Ok(15)
15298        );
15299        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15300
15301        // Client received stream.
15302        assert!(pipe.client.is_readable());
15303        assert!(pipe.server.is_readable());
15304
15305        // Client drains stream.
15306        let mut b = [0; 15];
15307        pipe.client.stream_recv(4, &mut b).unwrap();
15308        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15309
15310        assert!(!pipe.client.is_readable());
15311        assert!(pipe.server.is_readable());
15312
15313        // Server shuts down stream.
15314        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_shutdown(4, Shutdown::Read, 0), Ok(()));
15315        assert!(!pipe.server.is_readable());
15316
15317        // Server received dgram.
15318        assert_eq!(pipe.client.dgram_send(b"dddddddddddddd"), Ok(()));
15319        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15320
15321        assert!(!pipe.client.is_readable());
15322        assert!(pipe.server.is_readable());
15323
15324        // Client received dgram.
15325        assert_eq!(pipe.server.dgram_send(b"dddddddddddddd"), Ok(()));
15326        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15327
15328        assert!(pipe.client.is_readable());
15329        assert!(pipe.server.is_readable());
15330
15331        // Drain the dgram queues.
15332        let r = pipe.server.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15333        assert_eq!(r, Ok(14));
15334        assert!(!pipe.server.is_readable());
15335
15336        let r = pipe.client.dgram_recv(&mut buf);
15337        assert_eq!(r, Ok(14));
15338        assert!(!pipe.client.is_readable());
15339    }
15340
15341    #[test]
15342    fn close() {
15343        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
15344
15345        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
15346        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15347
15348        assert_eq!(pipe.client.close(false, 0x1234, b"hello?"), Ok(()));
15349
15350        assert_eq!(
15351            pipe.client.close(false, 0x4321, b"hello?"),
15352            Err(Error::Done)
15353        );
15354
15355        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
15356
15357        let frames =
15358            testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.server, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
15359
15360        assert_eq!(
15361            frames.first(),
15362            Some(&frame::Frame::ConnectionClose {
15363                error_code: 0x1234,
15364                frame_type: 0,
15365                reason: b"hello?".to_vec(),
15366            })
15367        );
15368    }
15369
15370    #[test]
15371    fn app_close_by_client() {
15372        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
15373
15374        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
15375        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15376
15377        assert_eq!(pipe.client.close(true, 0x1234, b"hello!"), Ok(()));
15378
15379        assert_eq!(pipe.client.close(true, 0x4321, b"hello!"), Err(Error::Done));
15380
15381        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
15382
15383        let frames =
15384            testing::decode_pkt(&mut pipe.server, &mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
15385
15386        assert_eq!(
15387            frames.first(),
15388            Some(&frame::Frame::ApplicationClose {
15389                error_code: 0x1234,
15390                reason: b"hello!".to_vec(),
15391            })
15392        );
15393    }
15394
15395    // OpenSSL does not provide a straightforward interface to deal with custom
15396    // off-load key signing.
15397    #[cfg(not(feature = "openssl"))]
15398    #[test]
15399    fn app_close_by_server_during_handshake_private_key_failure() {
15400        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
15401        pipe.server.handshake.set_failing_private_key_method();
15402
15403        // Client sends initial flight.
15404        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
15405        assert_eq!(
15406            testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, flight),
15407            Err(Error::TlsFail)
15408        );
15409
15410        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).unwrap();
15411
15412        // Both connections are not established.
15413        assert!(!pipe.server.is_established());
15414        assert!(!pipe.client.is_established());
15415
15416        // Connection should already be closed due the failure during key signing.
15417        assert_eq!(
15418            pipe.server.close(true, 123, b"fail whale"),
15419            Err(Error::Done)
15420        );
15421
15422        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.client, flight).unwrap();
15423
15424        // Connection should already be closed due the failure during key signing.
15425        assert_eq!(
15426            pipe.client.close(true, 123, b"fail whale"),
15427            Err(Error::Done)
15428        );
15429
15430        // Connection is not established on the server / client (and never
15431        // will be)
15432        assert!(!pipe.server.is_established());
15433        assert!(!pipe.client.is_established());
15434
15435        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15436
15437        assert_eq!(
15438            pipe.server.local_error(),
15439            Some(&ConnectionError {
15440                is_app: false,
15441                error_code: 0x01,
15442                reason: vec![],
15443            })
15444        );
15445        assert_eq!(
15446            pipe.client.peer_error(),
15447            Some(&ConnectionError {
15448                is_app: false,
15449                error_code: 0x01,
15450                reason: vec![],
15451            })
15452        );
15453    }
15454
15455    #[test]
15456    fn app_close_by_server_during_handshake_not_established() {
15457        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
15458
15459        // Client sends initial flight.
15460        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
15461        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, flight).unwrap();
15462
15463        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).unwrap();
15464
15465        // Both connections are not established.
15466        assert!(!pipe.client.is_established() && !pipe.server.is_established());
15467
15468        // Server closes before connection is established.
15469        pipe.server.close(true, 123, b"fail whale").unwrap();
15470
15471        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.client, flight).unwrap();
15472
15473        // Connection is established on the client.
15474        assert!(pipe.client.is_established());
15475
15476        // Client sends after connection is established.
15477        pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"badauthtoken", true).unwrap();
15478
15479        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
15480        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, flight).unwrap();
15481
15482        // Connection is not established on the server (and never will be)
15483        assert!(!pipe.server.is_established());
15484
15485        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15486
15487        assert_eq!(
15488            pipe.server.local_error(),
15489            Some(&ConnectionError {
15490                is_app: false,
15491                error_code: 0x0c,
15492                reason: vec![],
15493            })
15494        );
15495        assert_eq!(
15496            pipe.client.peer_error(),
15497            Some(&ConnectionError {
15498                is_app: false,
15499                error_code: 0x0c,
15500                reason: vec![],
15501            })
15502        );
15503    }
15504
15505    #[test]
15506    fn app_close_by_server_during_handshake_established() {
15507        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
15508
15509        // Client sends initial flight.
15510        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
15511        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, flight).unwrap();
15512
15513        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).unwrap();
15514
15515        // Both connections are not established.
15516        assert!(!pipe.client.is_established() && !pipe.server.is_established());
15517
15518        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.client, flight).unwrap();
15519
15520        // Connection is established on the client.
15521        assert!(pipe.client.is_established());
15522
15523        // Client sends after connection is established.
15524        pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"badauthtoken", true).unwrap();
15525
15526        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
15527        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, flight).unwrap();
15528
15529        // Connection is established on the server but the Handshake ACK has not
15530        // been sent yet.
15531        assert!(pipe.server.is_established());
15532
15533        // Server closes after connection is established.
15534        pipe.server
15535            .close(true, 123, b"Invalid authentication")
15536            .unwrap();
15537
15538        // Server sends Handshake ACK and then 1RTT CONNECTION_CLOSE.
15539        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15540
15541        assert_eq!(
15542            pipe.server.local_error(),
15543            Some(&ConnectionError {
15544                is_app: true,
15545                error_code: 123,
15546                reason: b"Invalid authentication".to_vec()
15547            })
15548        );
15549        assert_eq!(
15550            pipe.client.peer_error(),
15551            Some(&ConnectionError {
15552                is_app: true,
15553                error_code: 123,
15554                reason: b"Invalid authentication".to_vec()
15555            })
15556        );
15557    }
15558
15559    #[test]
15560    fn transport_close_by_client_during_handshake_established() {
15561        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
15562
15563        // Client sends initial flight.
15564        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
15565        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, flight).unwrap();
15566
15567        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).unwrap();
15568
15569        // Both connections are not established.
15570        assert!(!pipe.client.is_established() && !pipe.server.is_established());
15571
15572        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.client, flight).unwrap();
15573
15574        // Connection is established on the client.
15575        assert!(pipe.client.is_established());
15576
15577        // Client sends after connection is established.
15578        pipe.client.close(false, 123, b"connection close").unwrap();
15579
15580        let flight = testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.client).unwrap();
15581        testing::process_flight(&mut pipe.server, flight).unwrap();
15582
15583        assert_eq!(
15584            pipe.server.peer_error(),
15585            Some(&ConnectionError {
15586                is_app: false,
15587                error_code: 123,
15588                reason: b"connection close".to_vec()
15589            })
15590        );
15591        assert_eq!(
15592            pipe.client.local_error(),
15593            Some(&ConnectionError {
15594                is_app: false,
15595                error_code: 123,
15596                reason: b"connection close".to_vec()
15597            })
15598        );
15599    }
15600
15601    #[test]
15602    fn peer_error() {
15603        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
15604        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15605
15606        assert_eq!(pipe.server.close(false, 0x1234, b"hello?"), Ok(()));
15607        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15608
15609        assert_eq!(
15610            pipe.client.peer_error(),
15611            Some(&ConnectionError {
15612                is_app: false,
15613                error_code: 0x1234u64,
15614                reason: b"hello?".to_vec()
15615            })
15616        );
15617    }
15618
15619    #[test]
15620    fn app_peer_error() {
15621        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
15622        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15623
15624        assert_eq!(pipe.server.close(true, 0x1234, b"hello!"), Ok(()));
15625        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15626
15627        assert_eq!(
15628            pipe.client.peer_error(),
15629            Some(&ConnectionError {
15630                is_app: true,
15631                error_code: 0x1234u64,
15632                reason: b"hello!".to_vec()
15633            })
15634        );
15635    }
15636
15637    #[test]
15638    fn local_error() {
15639        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::new().unwrap();
15640        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15641
15642        assert_eq!(pipe.server.local_error(), None);
15643
15644        assert_eq!(pipe.server.close(true, 0x1234, b"hello!"), Ok(()));
15645
15646        assert_eq!(
15647            pipe.server.local_error(),
15648            Some(&ConnectionError {
15649                is_app: true,
15650                error_code: 0x1234u64,
15651                reason: b"hello!".to_vec()
15652            })
15653        );
15654    }
15655
15656    #[test]
15657    fn update_max_datagram_size() {
15658        let mut client_scid = [0; 16];
15659        rand::rand_bytes(&mut client_scid[..]);
15660        let client_scid = ConnectionId::from_ref(&client_scid);
15661        let client_addr = "127.0.0.1:1234".parse().unwrap();
15662
15663        let mut server_scid = [0; 16];
15664        rand::rand_bytes(&mut server_scid[..]);
15665        let server_scid = ConnectionId::from_ref(&server_scid);
15666        let server_addr = "127.0.0.1:4321".parse().unwrap();
15667
15668        let mut client_config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
15669        client_config
15670            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
15671            .unwrap();
15672        client_config.set_max_recv_udp_payload_size(1200);
15673
15674        let mut server_config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
15675        server_config
15676            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
15677            .unwrap();
15678        server_config
15679            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
15680            .unwrap();
15681        server_config
15682            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
15683            .unwrap();
15684        server_config.verify_peer(false);
15685        server_config
15686            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
15687            .unwrap();
15688        // Larger than the client
15689        server_config.set_max_send_udp_payload_size(1500);
15690
15691        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe {
15692            client: connect(
15693                Some("quic.tech"),
15694                &client_scid,
15695                client_addr,
15696                server_addr,
15697                &mut client_config,
15698            )
15699            .unwrap(),
15700            server: accept(
15701                &server_scid,
15702                None,
15703                server_addr,
15704                client_addr,
15705                &mut server_config,
15706            )
15707            .unwrap(),
15708        };
15709
15710        // Before handshake
15711        assert_eq!(
15712            pipe.server
15713                .paths
15714                .get_active()
15715                .expect("no active")
15716                .recovery
15717                .max_datagram_size(),
15718            1500,
15719        );
15720
15721        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15722
15723        // After handshake, max_datagram_size should match to client's
15724        // max_recv_udp_payload_size which is smaller
15725        assert_eq!(
15726            pipe.server
15727                .paths
15728                .get_active()
15729                .expect("no active")
15730                .recovery
15731                .max_datagram_size(),
15732            1200,
15733        );
15734        assert_eq!(
15735            pipe.server
15736                .paths
15737                .get_active()
15738                .expect("no active")
15739                .recovery
15740                .cwnd(),
15741            12000,
15742        );
15743    }
15744
15745    #[test]
15746    /// Tests that connection-level send capacity decreases as more stream data
15747    /// is buffered.
15748    fn send_capacity() {
15749        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
15750
15751        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
15752        config
15753            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
15754            .unwrap();
15755        config
15756            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
15757            .unwrap();
15758        config
15759            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
15760            .unwrap();
15761        config.set_initial_max_data(100000);
15762        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(10000);
15763        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(10000);
15764        config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(10);
15765        config.verify_peer(false);
15766
15767        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
15768        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15769
15770        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(0, b"hello!", true), Ok(6));
15771        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15772
15773        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"hello!", true), Ok(6));
15774        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15775
15776        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(8, b"hello!", true), Ok(6));
15777        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15778
15779        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(12, b"hello!", true), Ok(6));
15780        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15781
15782        let mut r = pipe.server.readable().collect::<Vec<u64>>();
15783        assert_eq!(r.len(), 4);
15784
15785        r.sort();
15786
15787        assert_eq!(r, [0, 4, 8, 12]);
15788
15789        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(0, &mut buf), Ok((6, true)));
15790        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut buf), Ok((6, true)));
15791        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(8, &mut buf), Ok((6, true)));
15792        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_recv(12, &mut buf), Ok((6, true)));
15793
15794        assert_eq!(pipe.server.tx_cap, 12000);
15795
15796        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(0, &buf[..5000], false), Ok(5000));
15797        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(4, &buf[..5000], false), Ok(5000));
15798        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(8, &buf[..5000], false), Ok(2000));
15799
15800        // No more connection send capacity.
15801        assert_eq!(
15802            pipe.server.stream_send(12, &buf[..5000], false),
15803            Err(Error::Done)
15804        );
15805        assert_eq!(pipe.server.tx_cap, 0);
15806
15807        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15808    }
15809
15810    #[cfg(feature = "boringssl-boring-crate")]
15811    #[test]
15812    fn user_provided_boring_ctx() -> Result<()> {
15813        // Manually construct `SSlContextBuilder` for the server.
15814        let mut server_tls_ctx_builder =
15815            boring::ssl::SslContextBuilder::new(boring::ssl::SslMethod::tls())
15816                .unwrap();
15817        server_tls_ctx_builder
15818            .set_certificate_chain_file("examples/cert.crt")
15819            .unwrap();
15820        server_tls_ctx_builder
15821            .set_private_key_file(
15822                "examples/cert.key",
15823                boring::ssl::SslFiletype::PEM,
15824            )
15825            .unwrap();
15826
15827        let mut server_config = Config::with_boring_ssl_ctx_builder(
15828            crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION,
15829            server_tls_ctx_builder,
15830        )?;
15831        let mut client_config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION)?;
15832        client_config.load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")?;
15833        client_config.load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")?;
15834
15835        for config in [&mut client_config, &mut server_config] {
15836            config.set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])?;
15837            config.set_initial_max_data(30);
15838            config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
15839            config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
15840            config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(10);
15841            config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
15842            config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(3);
15843            config.set_max_idle_timeout(180_000);
15844            config.verify_peer(false);
15845            config.set_ack_delay_exponent(8);
15846        }
15847
15848        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_client_and_server_config(
15849            &mut client_config,
15850            &mut server_config,
15851        )?;
15852
15853        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15854
15855        Ok(())
15856    }
15857
15858    #[cfg(feature = "boringssl-boring-crate")]
15859    #[test]
15860    fn in_handshake_config() -> Result<()> {
15861        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
15862
15863        const CUSTOM_INITIAL_CONGESTION_WINDOW_PACKETS: usize = 30;
15864
15865        // Manually construct `SSlContextBuilder` for the server.
15866        let mut server_tls_ctx_builder =
15867            boring::ssl::SslContextBuilder::new(boring::ssl::SslMethod::tls())
15868                .unwrap();
15869        server_tls_ctx_builder
15870            .set_certificate_chain_file("examples/cert.crt")
15871            .unwrap();
15872        server_tls_ctx_builder
15873            .set_private_key_file(
15874                "examples/cert.key",
15875                boring::ssl::SslFiletype::PEM,
15876            )
15877            .unwrap();
15878        server_tls_ctx_builder.set_select_certificate_callback(|mut hello| {
15879            Connection::set_initial_congestion_window_packets_in_handshake(
15880                hello.ssl_mut(),
15881                CUSTOM_INITIAL_CONGESTION_WINDOW_PACKETS,
15882            )
15883            .unwrap();
15884
15885            Ok(())
15886        });
15887
15888        let mut server_config = Config::with_boring_ssl_ctx_builder(
15889            crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION,
15890            server_tls_ctx_builder,
15891        )?;
15892
15893        let mut client_config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION)?;
15894        client_config.load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")?;
15895        client_config.load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")?;
15896
15897        for config in [&mut client_config, &mut server_config] {
15898            config.set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])?;
15899            config.set_initial_max_data(1000000);
15900            config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(15);
15901            config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(15);
15902            config.set_initial_max_stream_data_uni(10);
15903            config.set_initial_max_streams_bidi(3);
15904            config.set_initial_max_streams_uni(3);
15905            config.set_max_idle_timeout(180_000);
15906            config.verify_peer(false);
15907            config.set_ack_delay_exponent(8);
15908        }
15909
15910        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_client_and_server_config(
15911            &mut client_config,
15912            &mut server_config,
15913        )?;
15914
15915        // Client sends initial flight.
15916        let (len, _) = pipe.client.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
15917
15918        assert_eq!(pipe.server.tx_cap, 0);
15919
15920        // Server receives client's initial flight and updates its config.
15921        pipe.server_recv(&mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
15922
15923        assert_eq!(
15924            pipe.server.tx_cap,
15925            CUSTOM_INITIAL_CONGESTION_WINDOW_PACKETS * 1200
15926        );
15927
15928        // Server sends initial flight.
15929        let (len, _) = pipe.server.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
15930        pipe.client_recv(&mut buf[..len]).unwrap();
15931
15932        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15933
15934        Ok(())
15935    }
15936
15937    #[test]
15938    /// Tests that resetting a stream restores flow control for unsent data.
15939    fn last_tx_data_larger_than_tx_data() {
15940        let mut config = Config::new(PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
15941        config
15942            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
15943            .unwrap();
15944        config.set_initial_max_data(12000);
15945        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_local(20000);
15946        config.set_initial_max_stream_data_bidi_remote(20000);
15947        config.set_max_recv_udp_payload_size(1200);
15948        config.verify_peer(false);
15949
15950        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_client_config(&mut config).unwrap();
15951        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
15952
15953        // Client opens stream 4 and 8.
15954        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(4, b"a", true), Ok(1));
15955        assert_eq!(pipe.client.stream_send(8, b"b", true), Ok(1));
15956        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
15957
15958        // Server reads stream data.
15959        let mut b = [0; 15];
15960        pipe.server.stream_recv(4, &mut b).unwrap();
15961
15962        // Server sends stream data close to cwnd (12000).
15963        let buf = [0; 10000];
15964        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(4, &buf, false), Ok(10000));
15965
15966        testing::emit_flight(&mut pipe.server).unwrap();
15967
15968        // Server buffers some data, until send capacity limit reached.
15969        let mut buf = [0; 1200];
15970        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(4, &buf, false), Ok(1200));
15971        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(8, &buf, false), Ok(800));
15972        assert_eq!(pipe.server.stream_send(4, &buf, false), Err(Error::Done));
15973
15974        // Wait for PTO to expire.
15975        let timer = pipe.server.timeout().unwrap();
15976        std::thread::sleep(timer + time::Duration::from_millis(1));
15977
15978        pipe.server.on_timeout();
15979
15980        // Server sends PTO probe (not limited to cwnd),
15981        // to update last_tx_data.
15982        let (len, _) = pipe.server.send(&mut buf).unwrap();
15983        assert_eq!(len, 1200);
15984
15985        // Client sends STOP_SENDING to decrease tx_data
15986        // by unsent data. It will make last_tx_data > tx_data
15987        // and trigger #1232 bug.
15988        let frames = [frame::Frame::StopSending {
15989            stream_id: 4,
15990            error_code: 42,
15991        }];
15992
15993        let pkt_type = packet::Type::Short;
15994        pipe.send_pkt_to_server(pkt_type, &frames, &mut buf)
15995            .unwrap();
15996    }
15997
15998    /// Tests that when the client provides a new ConnectionId, it eventually
15999    /// reaches the server and notifies the application.
16000    #[test]
16001    fn send_connection_ids() {
16002        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
16003        config
16004            .load_cert_chain_from_pem_file("examples/cert.crt")
16005            .unwrap();
16006        config
16007            .load_priv_key_from_pem_file("examples/cert.key")
16008            .unwrap();
16009        config
16010            .set_application_protos(&[b"proto1", b"proto2"])
16011            .unwrap();
16012        config.verify_peer(false);
16013        config.set_active_connection_id_limit(3);
16014
16015        let mut pipe = testing::Pipe::with_config(&mut config).unwrap();
16016        assert_eq!(pipe.handshake(), Ok(()));
16017
16018        // So far, there should not have any QUIC event.
16019        assert_eq!(pipe.client.path_event_next(), None);
16020        assert_eq!(pipe.server.path_event_next(), None);
16021        assert_eq!(pipe.client.scids_left(), 2);
16022
16023        let (scid, reset_token) = testing::create_cid_and_reset_token(16);
16024        assert_eq!(pipe.client.new_scid(&scid, reset_token, false), Ok(1));
16025
16026        // Let exchange packets over the connection.
16027        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
16028
16029        // At this point, the server should be notified that it has a new CID.
16030        assert_eq!(pipe.server.available_dcids(), 1);
16031        assert_eq!(pipe.server.path_event_next(), None);
16032        assert_eq!(pipe.client.path_event_next(), None);
16033        assert_eq!(pipe.client.scids_left(), 1);
16034
16035        // Now, a second CID can be provided.
16036        let (scid, reset_token) = testing::create_cid_and_reset_token(16);
16037        assert_eq!(pipe.client.new_scid(&scid, reset_token, false), Ok(2));
16038
16039        // Let exchange packets over the connection.
16040        assert_eq!(pipe.advance(), Ok(()));
16041
16042        // At this point, the server should be notified that it has a new CID.
16043        assert_eq!(pipe.server.available_dcids(), 2);
16044        assert_eq!(pipe.server.path_event_next(), None);
16045        assert_eq!(pipe.client.path_event_next(), None);
16046        assert_eq!(pipe.client.scids_left(), 0);
16047
16048        // If now the client tries to send another CID, it reports an error
16049        // since it exceeds the limit of active CIDs.
16050        let (scid, reset_token) = testing::create_cid_and_reset_token(16);
16051        assert_eq!(
16052            pipe.client.new_scid(&scid, reset_token, false),
16053            Err(Error::IdLimit),
16054        );
16055    }
16056
16057    #[test]
16058    /// Tests that NEW_CONNECTION_ID with zero-length CID are rejected.
16059    fn connection_id_zero() {
16060        let mut buf = [0; 65535];
16061
16062        let mut config = Config::new(crate::PROTOCOL_VERSION).unwrap();
16063        config
